title: Experienced Property Manager Needed (Residential – Systems, Automation & Portfolio Experience)
description:
Summary

We are a real estate investment company that buys, renovates, and holds residential rental properties. We are looking to speak with experienced property managers who have strong systems and experience managing rental portfolios.



If you apply, please include the following information:

Years of property management experience

How many units you currently manage

Types of properties managed (single-family, multifamily, etc.)

What property management software you use (AppFolio, Buildium, Rent Manager, etc.)

What parts of your management process are automated

Your role (owner, manager, assistant, etc.)

Markets you manage properties in



We will review responses and schedule interviews with qualified candidates to learn more about your systems and processes.



Looking forward to connecting with experienced professionals. Thank you.

title: AI Video Creator Needed (OpenArt.ai) Create Real Estate Ad Videos + Ongoing AI Opportunities
description:
Description:

We are a fast-growing real estate investment company actively buying 70+ houses per year, and we’re looking for a talented AI video creator to help us produce short, high-impact advertising videos using AI tools like OpenArt.ai.

Our goal is to create engaging, scroll-stopping video content for marketing across platforms like
, Instagram, and YouTube.

What We Need:

• Create short AI-generated video clips using OpenArt.ai (or similar tools)

• Help turn concepts/ideas into polished ad-ready video content

• Ability to produce multiple variations for testing (different hooks, visuals, styles)

• Collaborate on creative direction (we’ll provide ideas, but value your input)

Bonus Skills (Strong Plus):

• Experience with other AI video tools (Runway, Pika, Sora, etc.)

• Video editing / post-production (adding captions, sound effects, music)

• Understanding of direct response marketing or ad creatives

• Ability to create UGC-style or storytelling-style content

About Us:

We are a real estate investment company that purchases distressed properties, renovates them, and either resells or holds as rentals. We are very marketing-driven and constantly testing new strategies to generate seller leads.

What We’re Looking For:

• Proven experience creating AI-generated videos

• Strong creative eye for attention-grabbing content

• Ability to move fast and iterate quickly

• Good communication and reliability

Big Bonus:

If you’ve worked on AI projects specifically for real estate investors, home buyers, or similar industries, we definitely want to hear about it.

Also, if you have experience with other AI or coding projects (automation, agents, workflows, etc.), please include details—we are actively expanding our use of AI across the business and may have additional opportunities.

To Apply:

Please include:

1. Examples of AI-generated videos you’ve created (especially ads)

2. What tools you use (OpenArt.ai, Runway, etc.)

3. Any experience working with real estate or similar businesses

4. Brief overview of any other AI or automation projects you’ve worked on

Looking forward to working with someone long-term as we scale ????

title: Title: Talent Acquisition Specialist / Headhunter (Real Estate Construction Hiring – High Growth Opportunity)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate investment company that purchases and renovates 75+ single-family homes per year.

We are scaling quickly and need to build a large, reliable construction team across multiple trades.

________________________________________

The Opportunity

We are hiring a Talent Acquisition Specialist / Headhunter to help us source, recruit, and onboard contractors and crews.

You will be responsible for actively finding talent (not waiting for applicants) and building a strong pipeline of skilled workers.

This role has the potential to become highly profitable for someone who produces results.

________________________________________

Roles You’ll Be Hiring For

• General Contractors 

• Electricians 

• Plumbers 

• Landscapers 

• Drywall Installers 

• Painters 

• Punchout Crews 

• Other construction trades as needed 

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Actively source contractors and crews using: 

o
 (groups, marketplace, outreach) 

o Craigslist 

o Google search (local contractors, company outreach) 

o Indeed and job boards 

o Other creative sourcing methods 

• Perform outbound outreach (messages, calls,
s) 

• Conduct phone interviews and screenings 

• Evaluate candidates (experience, pricing, reliability, communication) 

• Build and manage a pipeline of qualified contractors 

• Coordinate with our team to match crews with projects 

• Continuously improve sourcing and recruiting systems 

________________________________________

Requirements

• Strong English communication skills (written & spoken) 

• Comfortable making calls and conducting interviews 

• Experience in recruiting, hiring, or lead generation 

• Proactive “hunter” mindset (you go find talent) 

• Highly organized and results-driven 

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment 

________________________________________

Big Plus If You Have

• Experience sourcing through
, Craigslist, or Google 

• Experience recruiting construction or skilled trades 

• Knowledge of real estate investing or renovations 

• Experience working with U.S.-based companies 

________________________________________

Compensation & Growth

• Competitive base pay (based on experience) 

• Bonuses for successful hires and performance 

• Opportunity to grow into a Head of Recruiting role 

• High performers can earn significant income as we scale 

________________________________________

 Why This Role Is Different

• We buy and renovate 75+ homes per year (consistent hiring needs) 

• You will have a direct impact on company growth 

• Long-term opportunity with room to grow 

• Ability to build and lead your own recruiting operation 

________________________________________

How to Apply

Please include:

1. A short introduction 

2. Your experience with recruiting or sourcing or construction 

3. Which platforms you’ve used 
, Craigslist, Indeed, etc.) 

4. A voice recording or short video introduction (required) 

5. Examples of roles you’ve filled (if any) 

________________________________________

If you’re someone who can find talent anywhere and consistently produce hires, this role can turn into a very high-income opportunity.

title: Project Manager – Single Family Fix & Flips (Real Estate Investment Company | Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We are a fast-growing real estate investment company based in Maryland, USA. We purchase and renovate 75+ single-family homes per year, and we’re looking for an experienced Project Manager to help oversee and manage our renovation pipeline.



This is a critical role responsible for keeping projects on time, on budget, and running efficiently.



Your Responsibilities:

Manage multiple fix & flip renovation projects from start to finish

Coordinate with contractors, subcontractors, and vendors

Review scopes of work and ensure projects are executed correctly

Track budgets, timelines, and job progress across all properties

Identify and solve issues quickly to avoid delays or cost overruns

Ensure materials are ordered and delivered on time

Communicate regularly with our internal team on project status

Maintain organized records, updates, and reporting systems

Help improve systems and processes as we scale

Requirements:

Proven experience managing single-family home renovations / construction projects

Strong understanding of rehab scopes, sequencing, and timelines

Ability to manage multiple projects at once

Excellent communication and organizational skills

Detail-oriented with strong follow-up and accountability

Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

Preferred Experience:

Experience working with real estate investors or fix & flip companies

Familiarity with U.S. construction standards and expectations

Experience with tools like Podio, Buildertrend, 
, Excel/Google Sheets, etc.

What Makes This Opportunity Unique:

We complete 75+ projects per year (consistent volume)

Long-term, stable position with a growing company

Opportunity to grow into a senior leadership role

Work directly with a high-performing acquisitions and operations team

How to Apply:



Please include:



A detailed description of your experience managing construction or renovation projects (specifically single-family homes if applicable)

The technology/tools you have used to manage projects and why you prefer them

How many projects you have managed at one time

Why you would be a strong fit for this role



We are looking for someone who takes ownership, communicates well, and can help us scale efficiently.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO & COO – Real Estate Investment Company (Full-Time, Long-Term Opportunity)
description:
We are a fast-growing real estate investment company based in Maryland, USA, purchasing and renovating 70+ houses per year. We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to work directly with our CEO and COO.



This is a high-impact role where you will be deeply involved in daily operations and play a key part in helping us scale.



Your Role & Responsibilities:



You will be responsible for supporting leadership and helping keep operations running smoothly:



Managing transaction coordination (contracts, timelines, follow-ups)

Communicating with and coordinating contractors & vendors

Ordering materials and tracking deliveries for renovation projects

Submitting offers on properties and assisting with acquisitions

Tracking and reporting on KPIs and company performance

Organizing and maintaining data, files, and systems

Preparing and sending DocuSign documents

Managing schedules, tasks, and follow-ups for CEO & COO

Ensuring nothing falls through the cracks across multiple projects

Who We’re Looking For:

Strong experience as an Executive Assistant (required)

Excellent English communication skills (written & verbal)

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities

Proactive problem solver who takes initiative

Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

Bonus Experience (Preferred but Not Required):

Experience in real estate investing, wholesaling, or property management

Knowledge of construction or renovation processes

Familiarity with tools like Podio, GoHighLevel, DocuSign, Google Sheets, etc.

Why This Role is Different:

Work directly with high-level operators (CEO & COO)

Be part of a company doing 70+ deals per year

Opportunity for growth, increased responsibility, and higher pay

Long-term, stable position with a winning team

 How to Apply:



Please include the following:



A short paragraph about your Executive Assistant experience

Any experience you have with real estate or construction

Examples of tools/systems you’ve used

Why you would be a great fit for this role

A video introduction answers the questions 



If you are highly organized, driven, and want to grow with a fast-moving real estate company, we want to hear from you.

title: Vehicle Wrap Graphic Designer — Adobe Illustrator Expert (Part-Time, Growing to Full-Time)
description:
About Us

 Summit Wraps and Graphics is a vehicle wrap and branding company based in Utah, USA. We do full wraps, partial wraps, decals, fleet graphics, and commercial branding for businesses of all sizes. We're growing fast and need a talented designer to join our team.



The Role

We're looking for a graphic designer who lives and breathes Adobe Illustrator. Your primary job is creating professional vehicle wrap mockups — taking a client's brand (logo, colors, messaging) and turning it into a stunning design laid out on vehicle templates.



You'll work closely with our team through our CRM system (GoHighLevel) and Slack. Jobs will come to you through our pipeline — you'll receive the client info, create mockup options, send proofs for approval, make revisions, and prepare production-ready files.



  What You'll Do

  - Design vehicle wrap mockups (full wraps, partial wraps, decals, fleet graphics)

  - Work with vehicle templates to create realistic mockups for client approval

  - Take client feedback and make revisions quickly

  - Prepare print-ready files with proper bleed, panel layout, and cut lines

  - Communicate with clients through our CRM to present designs and collect feedback

  - Organize design files and maintain our template library

  - Occasional marketing graphics (social media, ads, proposals) as needed



  Must-Have Skills

  - Expert-level Adobe Illustrator (this is non-negotiable — you'll use it daily)

  - Strong understanding of print design (CMYK, bleed, resolution, large format)

  - Clean, professional design aesthetic — especially bold commercial/industrial styles

  - Ability to work with vehicle templates and understand how designs wrap around 3D surfaces

  - Excellent English communication (you'll interact with clients)

  - Reliable internet connection and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time) for at

  least a few overlapping hours

  - Responsive — we value fast communication and quick turnaround



  Preferred Skills (Big Plus)

  - Vehicle wrap or signage industry experience

  - Knowledge of RIP software (VersaWorks) and cutting software (Graphtec Studio)

  - Adobe Photoshop proficiency

  - Canva and/or Figma experience

  - Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel or similar)

  - Understanding of vinyl materials, laminates, and installation considerations



  About the Position

  - Part-time to start: approximately 20 hours/week

  - Compensation: $4-6/hr USD depending on experience (paid weekly or bi-weekly)

  - Schedule: Flexible, but must have overlap with US Mountain Time for communication

  - Growth: As our workload increases, this role will grow to full-time with a pay increase

  - Long-term: We're looking for someone to grow with us, not a one-off freelancer



  What Success Looks Like

  - You receive a job brief (business name, logo, colors, phone, website, vehicle type)

  - Within 24-48 hours, you deliver 2-3 professional mockup options

  - Client picks one, you make revisions within a few hours

  - Final file is print-ready and organized properly

  - You communicate clearly at every step — no disappearing acts



  To Apply

  1. Send your portfolio with at least 3 examples of vehicle wrap designs OR large format

  print/signage work

  2. Tell us about your Illustrator experience — how many years, what type of projects

  3. What is your availability and preferred working hours?

  4. What is your expected hourly rate in USD?

title: UI/UX Design & System Architecture for Advanced CRM Platform
description:
We are building a modern, scalable CRM platform similar to tools like Workiz and Salesforce, tailored for service-based businesses (locksmith, field services, etc.).



The system will include customer management, communication (calls/SMS), job tracking, invoicing, and real-time activity monitoring.



We are looking for a high-level UI/UX Designer + Product Architect who can design both:



A clean, intuitive interface (web + mobile)

A scalable system structure (UX flows + architecture thinking)

???? Scope of Work

1. UI/UX Design

Design a modern, clean CRM dashboard

Create full user flows:

Customer management

Job/work order management

SMS/chat interface

Call logs & recordings

Payments & invoices

Design for:

Desktop (primary)

Mobile responsive

Create:

Wireframes (low + high fidelity)

Final UI screens (Figma or similar)

Design system (colors, components, typography)

2. UX Strategy & Product Thinking

Define user journeys for:

Admin

Dispatcher

Technician

Optimize for:

Speed (few clicks to complete actions)

Real-time usage (live calls, updates)

Suggest improvements based on existing CRMs (like Workiz)

3. System Architecture (High-Level)



We are NOT looking for deep backend coding, but we DO need:



System structure planning:

Modules (CRM, calls, messaging, payments)

User roles & permissions

Data flow diagrams:

How calls/SMS integrate

How jobs move through pipeline

Recommendations for:

Tech stack (frontend/backend)

Scalable infrastructure (multi-user system)

4. Features to Design

Dashboard (KPIs, live activity)

Customer profiles

Job scheduling & dispatch board

Chat/SMS system (like iMessage style)

Call system (logs + recordings)

Invoice & payment screen

Notifications system

???? Requirements

Proven experience designing CRM / SaaS platforms

Strong portfolio (preferably similar systems)

Experience with tools like:

Figma

Adobe XD (optional)

Understanding of UX for real-time systems

Bonus:

Experience with VoIP / communication platforms

Experience with field-service businesses

???? Deliverables

Full UI/UX design (Figma file)

Wireframes + final screens

Design system

User flows & diagrams

High-level system architecture documentation

???? Ideal Candidate



We’re looking for someone who:



Thinks like a product owner, not just a designer

Can simplify complex systems

Understands how CRM businesses actually operate

Can build something better than existing platforms, not just copy

???? Goal



To create a powerful, scalable, and easy-to-use CRM that can support 1000+ users, real-time communication, and future expansion.

title: Senior SEO + Google Ads Lead (Local Service – Performance Focused)
description:
We’re a Las Vegas-based drain cleaning company focused on one thing:



???? Driving high-intent inbound calls and booked jobs — consistently.



We are looking for a senior-level SEO + Google Ads operator who has a track record of generating real leads for US-based local service businesses (plumbing, HVAC, etc.)



This is not a “traffic” role.

This is a performance role tied to calls, cost per lead, and revenue.



?



???? WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

 • Increased inbound call volume within 30–60 days

 • Reduced cost per lead across campaigns

 • Strong visibility in Google Maps + organic + paid search

 • High-converting landing pages aligned with search intent



?



? REQUIREMENTS:

 • Proven results with local service businesses in the US

 • Hands-on experience managing Google Ads (search + call-driven campaigns)

 • Deep understanding of high-intent keyword strategy

 • Experience optimizing Google Business Profile (Maps rankings)

 • Ability to build or guide conversion-focused landing pages

 • Strong grasp of call tracking, attribution, and lead quality



?



???? THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR:

 • Content writers or blog-focused SEOs

 • Backlink-only specialists

 • General VAs doing “SEO tasks”

 • Anyone without real performance metrics



?



???? IDEAL CANDIDATE:



You’ve:

 • Managed campaigns where phone calls were the primary KPI

 • Worked in competitive local markets

 • Made decisions based on data, not theory

 • Owned results — not just tasks



?



???? RESPONSIBILITIES:

 • Own and optimize Google Ads campaigns

 • Identify and rank for high-converting local keywords

 • Align SEO, paid traffic, and Maps for maximum coverage

 • Improve conversion rates across landing pages

 • Continuously reduce cost per lead while increasing volume



?



???? TO APPLY:



Answer the following clearly and specifically:



1. Describe a local service campaign where you increased calls or leads. Include numbers if possible.

2. If you were starting from scratch, how would you generate calls for a drain cleaning company in Las Vegas within 30–60 days?

3. What would you prioritize first: SEO, Google Ads, or Maps — and why?



?



???? HOURS & STRUCTURE:

 • Start part-time

 • Scale to long-term / full-time based on performance

 • Opportunity to grow with the company as we expand



?



???? FINAL NOTE:



We are looking for someone who thinks like an operator, not a task-doer.

If you’ve produced real results and can do it again, this will be a strong long-term opportunity.
salary: Higher pay for proven call generation

title: Content creation manager
description:
Content Creation (Part-Time, Remote | Growth Opportunity)

We are a fast-growing health & wellness brand focused on functional medicine (thyroid, metabolism, and root-cause healing). We’re looking for a high-performing Content Creation Assistant to help us scale across social media with intention and quality.

This is not a basic VA role — we are looking for someone who understands content, trends, and storytelling, and wants to grow with a brand long-term.

Role Overview

You will be responsible for supporting our content engine end-to-end:

Researching trends and viral content

Ideating and scripting posts

Editing and repurposing content

Posting across platforms (IG, TikTok, etc.)

Responsibilities

Study viral content and trends daily (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

Generate content ideas aligned with our niche (health/functional medicine)

Write scripts for:

Storytelling short-form videos

Educational content

Viral-style hooks and angles

Edit videos (B-roll, captions, pacing, hooks)

Repurpose long-form into multiple short-form pieces

Create carousel posts (educational + engaging)

Schedule and post content consistently

Collaborate and communicate with the team for feedback and improvements

Content Types You’ll Work On

Story-driven short-form videos

Viral-style content (hooks, trends, angles)

Educational/authority content

B-roll style videos

Carousel posts

Long-form ? short-form repurposing

Requirements

Strong understanding of social media trends and viral content

Experience with video editing tools (CapCut, etc.)

Good sense of storytelling, hooks, and audience psychology

High attention to detail and quality

Professional, reliable, and communicative

Fast learner with a growth mindset

Able to take feedback and improve quickly

Work Schedule

Part-time: 4 hours/day

1:00 PM – 5:00 PM PST (fixed schedule)

Compensation

$400/month (first 3 months – training period)

$500/month after 3 months (based on performance and fit)

Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility

Who This Is For

This role is ideal for someone who:

Wants to grow into a high-level content strategist

Is obsessed with improving content performance

Takes ownership and pride in their work

Wants to be part of building a meaningful brand

How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume or portfolio

Examples of content you’ve created (videos, edits, or posts)

A short Loom/video explaining:

Why you’re a good fit

Your experience with viral/trending content

Your favorite content creator and why

If you’re just looking for a basic VA job, this is not for you.

If you want to grow, learn, and build something meaningful — we want to hear from you.



Test assignment: 



Part 1: Viral Research (Thinking Test)

Find 3 viral videos in the health / wellness / weight loss / thyroid niche.

For each video:

Link the video

Explain:

Why it went viral (hook, structure, emotion, curiosity, etc.)

Who the target audience is

How you would adapt this for our brand (functional medicine / thyroid)

Part 2: Script Writing (Strategy + Copy)

Write a short-form video scripts (30–60 sec):

Topic: Root cause vs conventional medicine

Style: Educational + authority

Each script must include:

Strong hook (first 3 seconds)

Clear flow

Call-to-action (book a call / learn more)

Part 3: Short-form edited video by you.

Please send a link. 

Part 4: Carousel of any you already made before.

Please send a link. 



Potential to grow with the family to full-time as the company grows.

description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a true
 expert to join us on a gig basis.



You must know the ins and outs of
 advertising, including how to properly set up and manage campaigns, target the right audiences, and help develop strategies for gaining more business and 
 through
.



It is very important that you know how to properly set up Amazon attribution links for

This is not a beginner position.

Beginners do not apply.



We are specifically looking for someone who is highly experienced, dependable, and truly knows what they are doing. We need someone who can contribute at a high level from the beginning.



What we need:



Strong experience with
 ads

 ads, landing pages, WordPress, and Elementor

Must be able to help with strategies for gaining more business and 
 through

Hourly pay

Paid every Friday

title: Experienced Sales Virtual Assistant for MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD | Inbound Calls, Cold Calling, Outreach & Closing
description:
MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is looking for a highly experienced Sales Virtual Assistant to join our growing company for the long term.



We are not looking for just another VA.



We are looking for someone confident, persuasive, professional, and hungry to grow with a company that is building something serious in the cleaning industry.



This role is for someone who is excellent on the phone, speaks very strong English, knows how to speak with leads professionally, can handle both inbound and outbound calls, and already has real experience working with a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both.



You must be able to prove your experience.



We are building for the long term, and we want someone who is not just looking for a temporary job, but someone who wants to become part of a company with growth, stability, and ongoing opportunity.



Main Responsibilities

Answer inbound calls from potential clients

Make outbound calls and cold calls to generate new business

Follow up with leads quickly and consistently

Do client outreach in high volume

Speak confidently with potential clients and handle objections

Help convert leads into booked appointments or closed deals

Communicate professionally by phone, message, and

Keep lead information organized and updated

What We Are Looking For

Excellent spoken and written English

Strong confidence on calls

Proven experience in sales

Proven experience working for a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both

Strong ability in cold calling and client follow-up

Experience with high-volume outreach

Ability to close deals

Persuasive, professional, and confident communication

Organized, reliable, and consistent work ethic

Important



You must be able to prove that you have already worked in this type of role.



Please do not apply if you do not have real experience in:



cleaning company sales

cold calling

client outreach

closing



We are only looking for someone who already understands this environment and can bring value from the beginning.



Why Join Us



MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is a growing company with a long-term vision.



We are looking for the right person to grow with us as we expand. For the right candidate, this is an opportunity to build a stable long-term role inside a business that values strong performance, commitment, and results.



If you are ambitious, reliable, and know how to generate and close cleaning clients, this could become a very strong long-term opportunity for you.



To Apply



Start your application with: CLEANING SALES PRO



Then answer all of the following:



What cleaning companies have you worked for before?

Was your experience in residential cleaning, commercial cleaning, or both?

What exactly did you do in that role?

How much of your work involved inbound calls, outbound calls, and cold calling?

What results did you get?

How do you usually handle objections from potential clients?

What is your experience with high-volume outreach?

What is your experience with closing sales?

Please send proof of your previous experience in this industry

Please send a voice recording introducing yourself in English

Proof Required



Please send any of the following if available:



voice recording

screenshots

call recordings

CRM screenshots

references

proof of past work with a cleaning company



We are looking for someone strong, experienced, and ready to build something long term with us.

title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant (Guest Communication & Operations | Long-Term Role)
description:
1. Role Overview



We are a growing short-term rental and Airbnb business managing multiple properties with documented systems, SOPs, and clear expectations.



We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented Airbnb Virtual Assistant to support daily operations, guest communication, scheduling, and administrative tracking. This is a long-term role for someone who is organized, calm under pressure, and comfortable following systems precisely.



This is not a one-off gig. We are looking for someone who wants stability, consistency, and the opportunity to grow with the business over time.



--



2. Core Responsibilities



You will be responsible for the day-to-day operational support of our rental portfolio, including:

 • Responding to guest messages (pre-stay, during stay, and post-stay) in a professional and empathetic manner

 • Dealing with occasional upset guests in a professional, courteous, and empathetic manner 

 • Managing calendars, reservations, and availability

 • Coordinating and scheduling cleaners, maintenance, and turnovers

 • Logging guest issues, i
, and resolutions accurately

 • Updating spreadsheets, checklists, and task logs

 • Following SOPs exactly and documenting any edge cases or exceptions

 • Proactively identifying potential problems before they escalate

 • Supporting general administrative tasks as assigned



--



3. Required Skills & Traits



This role is a good fit if you are:

 • Highly detail-oriented and organized

 • Comfortable working with people who are happy, upset, and everything in between

 • Comfortable working with checklists, systems, and written procedures

 • Calm, professional, and clear in written AND spoken English

 • Proactive and able to think one step ahead

 • Reliable with consistent availability

 • Able to manage multiple properties and tasks without losing accuracy

 • Interested in a long-term position, not short-term or part-time gigs



--



4. Tools & Experience (Preferred)



Experience with the following is helpful, but training will be provided:

 • Airbnb platform and/or a Property Management System (PMS) such as Guesty, HostAway, etc

 • Google Workspace (Google Sheets, Docs)

 • Slack or similar communication tools

 • Breezeway

 • Task tracking tools (Notion, ClickUp, or similar)

 • Prior experience supporting Airbnb or short-term rental operations is a strong plus



--



5. Work Structure, Pay & Growth

 • Schedule: 30-40+ hours per week. Opportunity for more work if desired.

 • Timezone Overlap: Must be available during PST hours.

 • Contract Type: Independent Contractor

 • Pay: $500-$800+/mo (paid consistently; performance-based increases over time)

 • Growth Path: Pay will reliably increase over time with bonus opportunities if you are proactive, vigilant, and always looking to improve.

 • Increased responsibilities

 • Pay raises based on performance

 • Potential leadership or senior VA role as the portfolio grows

 • Potential for investment opportunity into Airbnbs if you go above and beyond in the maintenance and growth of the business



We value consistency, trust, and long-term collaboration.



?



6. Application Instructions (Required)



To apply, follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow them will not be reviewed.

 1. Start your application message with the phrase: “SYSTEMS FIRST”

 2. Briefly describe your experience (if any) with Airbnb, short-term rentals, or guest communication

 3. Answer the following  scenario in 3–5 sentences:

SCENARIO 1: A guest messages at 10:30 PM saying the internet is not working and they need it for work in the morning. How would you respond and what steps would you take?

SCENARIO 2: A guest messages saying that the house is not cleaned and the pool is dirty. How do you handle it and what steps would you take?

SCENARIO 3: A guest reports various potential issues with the house, but doesn't actually complain about them. How do you handle this so that it can be addressed before another guest complains about it?



--



We are looking for clear thinking, professionalism, attention to detail, and a desire to be a part of and grow this business!



--



If you are organized, reliable, and looking for a stable long-term role with a growing business, we encourage you to apply.

title: Medical professional
description:
Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented Medical Professional (Physician or highly experienced Nurse) to join our team as a New Patient Coordinator. This role is critical in ensuring our clinical workflow runs smoothly by preparing patient charts and managing the initial intake process.



Key Responsibilities:



Medical Record Review: Thoroughly review incoming patient records, history, and lab results 2–3 days prior to scheduled appointments.



Chart Updating: Summarize key findings and update our EMR system to ensure the treating physician has the most current information ready.



Patient Coordination: Act as the first point of contact for new patients, explaining our process and gathering necessary documentation. Will  also update the charts with the necessary information closer to the appointment. 



Appointment Scheduling: Manage the calendar to book and confirm appointments for new patients.



Data Integrity: Ensure all patient information is handled with the highest level of confidentiality and accuracy.



Requirements 



Medical Degree  or equivalent clinical experience.. May be considered depending on experience 



Previous experience with EMR/EHR systems.



Excellent written and spoken English.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to work independently.



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace.

title: Performance Creatives Video Editor Role
description:
We're ZocialGen, a creative agency that specialises in performance ads for Meta and TikTok.



We're looking for a video editor who can produce high-performing ad creatives - including Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated ads using AI tools.



You've probably seen these viral animated ads on TikTok and Reels - 3D Pixar-style characters, cinematic lighting, short-form vertical video. We produce these at scale for our DTC clients and need someone who already knows how to make them or can pick it up fast.

This role involves:



Creating Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated short-form ads using AI generation tools

Writing prompts for AI image generators and AI video animation tools

Editing and stitching animated clips into polished 9:16 and 4:5 ad creatives

Adding voiceover, captions, and post-production polish in CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci

Working from scripts and reference videos to produce scene-by-scene animated content

Traditional video editing work beyond AI animation (UGC cuts, static ads, etc.)



What we're looking for:



Experience with AI image generation tools (we want to hear which ones you use)

Experience with AI video/animation tools (same — tell us your go-to tools)

Strong eye for cinematic composition, lighting, and Pixar-style aesthetics

Ability to prompt effectively — you understand that the prompt is the craft

Post-production skills: stitching scenes, syncing voiceover, adding captions

Fast turnaround and clear communication



Bonus: experience creating ads or content for DTC/ecommerce brands



This is a part-time / project-based role. We'll start with a trial task to see how you work.



To apply: Please fill out the Google Form linked below. You may find the trial task in the form.





Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph messaging.



Applications are only accepted through the Google Form.

title: AI Copywriter & Content Systems Builder - B2B Pre-Call Sales Copy (Direct Response + Claude)
description:
Summary

We're hiring our first AI-native copywriter at Preclose.ai - a B2B consultancy that's generated $11M+ in closed revenue for clients by fixing the "72-hour dead zone" between when prospects book sales calls and actually show up.



This isn't blog writing. This isn't social media captions. This is conversion copy inside a revenue system that clients pay $10K+/month for.



You'll operate a 6-phase intelligence-to-copy workflow:



- Analyze 15–20 sales call transcripts and extract verbatim customer language, objection patterns, and buying triggers (prompts included)

- Build pre-call
 sequences, iMessage/SMS flows, no-show recovery, reactivation sequences, and sales enablement assets

- Use Claude Projects and prompt chains to multiply your output - not replace your judgment

- Write content for Preclose itself that attracts B2B operators doing $5M+ (X, LinkedIn)

- Track performance data (open rates, reply rates, show rates) and iterate copy based on what's actually working



See the attached job posting for full details on the role, system, and what we're looking for.



What you'll produce (per client engagement):



- 5+
 sequences (confirmation, value, reminder, no-show, reactivation)

- 9–13 iMessage/SMS touchpoints with branching logic

- Response banks for live sales conversations

- Setter playbooks and objection handling frameworks

- VSL scripts, landing page copy, sales decks

- Master Intelligence Documents compiled from transcript analysis



You're a fit if:

- You've written
 sequences with real performance stats (not just "I wrote
s")

- You understand direct response principles - hooks, mechanisms, proof, awareness levels

- You've built AI workflows (prompt chains, automation systems) that produced real output

- You can read a sales call transcript and pull the 3 phrases that should be in every

- You think in systems, not just sentences

- You're comfortable in an early-stage environment (team of 3) where you own outcomes



You're NOT a fit if:

- You write "content" but have never written copy that had to convert

- You use AI to generate first drafts and ship them without heavy editing

- You think good writing = grammatically perfect (we care about persuasion)

- You need daily direction on what to do



About us:



Preclose.ai fixes the gap nobody owns - the 72 hours between booking and showing up. Our clients see show rates jump from 40% to 75%+, close rates improve 20%+, and sales cycles shorten because prospects arrive pre-educated. We work with B2B software companies, agencies, and consultants doing $5M+ annually.



Team of 3. Fully remote. You'd report directly to the founder.

To apply:



- Send a brief note on why this role interests you

- Share 1–2 examples of copy you've written that had measurable results 
 sequences, landing pages, sales copy - anything with numbers)- Bonus: Show us an AI workflow or prompt system you've built

title: Long-Term YouTube Video Editor (Descript Only) for Growing Fashion Channel
description:
I'm a personal stylist with a rapidly growing YouTube channel seeking a dedicated video editor to join my team. This isn't a one-off project – I'm building a content empire and need someone who wants to grow with me.



What You'll Be Doing:



- Edit 15-30 minute YouTube videos using Descript exclusively (no other software will be used unless there is a need to mask an item which rarely happens)

- Process my raw files through Descript's AI features (gap removal, filler word cleanup, retake elimination)

- Follow my established editing templates for intros, outros, on-screen text, photo and video integration

- Ensure seamless flow and professional polish on every video

- Cutting out 3-5 short clips from every long-form video using Descript's AI Underlord, creating titles and captions and scheduling them on Youtube and Instagram



Currently: 1 video per week - this will be a 10 hours/week job to begin with. A possibility to grow into a full-time member is possible.



What Makes You Perfect for This Role:



? Descript expertise – You know this software inside and out

? Reliability champion – You deliver early, not on deadline

? Clear communicator – You ask the right questions and keep me updated

? Detail-oriented – You follow templates precisely while maintaining creative flow

? Team player mentality – You're excited about long-term collaboration, not quick cash

? Flexible - you receive feedback well and strive to become better and more efficient every time

? Fast & efficient - I am a small channel so my budget is limited at the moment. I want to work with someone who delivers great work fast, doesn't overuse AI credits and takes constructive feedback well.

? Interest in style and fashion - a sense of style and design principles would be great so that you create visually appealing videos.



Why You'll Love Working With Me:



- Consistent, growing workload with predictable income potential

- Clear systems and templates (no guesswork on your part)

- Direct communication with me (no middleman confusion)

- Opportunity to be part of a channel's growth journey from the ground up

- Creative input welcomed as we scale together



Before You Apply:



MUST DO: Watch my recent videos at 
 to understand my current editing style and format. Mention something specific about my editing approach in your proposal.



Your Application Should Include:



- Your experience with Descript (specific examples preferred)

- Why you're interested in long-term collaboration vs. one-off projects

- Your typical turnaround time for 15-30 minute videos

- One specific thing you noticed about my current editing style



Ready to become my go-to editor and grow together? Let's make some amazing content!

title: Founding Product Builder (AI + Behavioral Design)
description:
About Us



We’re building an app designed to solve a real problem:



Most women feel stuck, unclear on what they’re good at, and disconnected from what they actually enjoy.



This app helps them figure it out through action, not overthinking.



Users start with a short, psychology-driven quiz that identifies strengths, interests, and patterns. From there, AI generates personalized, real-world experiments they can try immediately to discover what actually fits them.



This is not a journaling app.

This is a clarity-through-action system.



The Role

We’re looking for a Founding Product Builder to take this from idea ? live app.

You won’t just be coding. You’ll be shaping the product, challenging assumptions, and building something people actually use.

If you need detailed instructions for everything, this is not your role.



What You’ll Build

A high-converting onboarding quiz that identifies:

Strengths

Energy drivers

Skill patterns

AI-powered recommendations that:

Turn insights into tiny, testable experiments

Adapt based on user behavior and feedback

A feedback loop that tracks:

What users try

What they enjoy

What they avoid

A simple, engaging user experience that keeps people coming back



Responsibilities

Build and launch the MVP quickly

Design and implement AI-driven personalization

Collaborate on product strategy and user experience

Continuously improve the system based on user data

Push for simplicity, speed, and real user outcomes



Requirements:

Experience building consumer-facing apps

Strong product thinking (not just technical execution)

Experience working with AI APIs (like OpenAI or similar)

Ability to work in ambiguity and move fast

Bias toward action over perfection



Nice to Have

Experience with behavioral psychology or habit-building products

Experience building early-stage or 0 ? 1 products

Opinions on why most “self-discovery” apps fail

title: YouTube Editor / Producer
description:
Here's the job description, ready to post:



Video Editor — MMG Studio (Contract / Freelance)

Location: Remote (Columbus, OH based company)

Type: Hourly

Compensation: Based on experience and scope



About MMG Studio

MMG Studio is a healthcare-focused web design and lead generation agency based in Columbus, OH. We work with marketing directors, agency partners, and founders inside $2-10M companies navigating real marketing challenges in regulated industries.

Our content exists to educate, build trust, and position MMG as the clearest voice in a noisy space. We are not a hype channel. We are not a trend studio. We speak to people who are smart, busy, and skeptical.



About the Role

We're looking for a video editor who can deliver polished, on-brand video content across long-form YouTube videos, short-form clips, and podcast-style edits. You'll receive raw footage, a brand guide, and clear direction. Your job is to turn that into something calm, clean, and credible.



Our audience is healthcare marketing directors. They're skeptical, under pressure, and allergic to anything that feels loud or chaotic. If the editing feels like a YouTuber highlight reel, you're not the right fit. If you can make something feel smooth, confident, and purposeful, keep reading.



What You'll Be Editing



Long-form YouTube content (educational, strategy-focused)

Short-form vertical clips for YouTube Shorts and LinkedIn

Podcast-style interview edits

Occasional promotional or explainer videos



What We Expect



Strong hooks in the first 5 to 8 seconds. No slow intros. No "hey guys welcome back." Get to the point.

Moderate pacing. Let ideas land before moving on. No rapid-fire cuts for the sake of energy.

Clean transitions only. Simple cuts and fades. No flashy wipes, slides, or animated gradients.

On-screen text that reinforces the point being made, not decorates it. Bold key phrases, not everything. Five words or fewer per graphic.

Sound design that is subtle and intentional. A light click or whoosh on text is fine. No bass drops, 
 sounds, or audio stingers. Background music sits low and never distracts.



Brand Style at a Glance

You'll receive a full brand guide before starting.



What You Need



Proficiency in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve

Experience editing talking-head and educational content (not just montages or music videos)

The ability to follow a brand guide closely without being asked twice

Clean file management and organized project files

Reliable communication and turnaround times



Bonus Points



Experience editing content in healthcare, B2B, or professional services

Familiarity with YouTube best practices (retention, pacing, thumbnail alignment)

Motion graphics capability for simple lower thirds and text treatments

Comfortable working in Google Drive for file delivery and collaboration

s to registered players using provided templates

 communications via Gmail and Outlook

Requirements

Compensation & Benefits

title: YouTube Visual Research Assistant (Find B-Roll & Creative Visual Ideas)
description:
Hello!



I run a YouTube channel and need someone to help find interesting, non-obvious visuals (b-roll, clips, images) to match my scripts.  This is NOT basic research - huge emphasis on visual research!



You will:

- Read short script sections

- Suggest creative visual ideas (not always literal)

- Find real clips/images that match those ideas



Example:



If the script says:

“Two people took a substance and died”



Bad:

- Pills

- Coffins



Good:

- Empty chairs at a table

- Flickering hospital hallway lights

- Abandoned bedroom with sunlight coming through the window



That’s the level of thinking I expect.



What You’ll Do:

- Suggest 2–3 visual ideas per script line

- Find matching clips/images (YouTube, stock, etc.)

- Send links and organize everything clearly (Google Doc or similar)



Requirements:

- Strong visual taste (you can tell what feels interesting vs generic)

- Understand mood, storytelling, and tone

- NOT overly literal thinking 

- Bonus: familiarity with YouTube editing/pacing



Hours & Pay:

- ~15 hrs/week

- $400/month



To apply:



1. Start your application with the word “orange”



2. Answer this:



If the line is "He slowly lost everything," give three (3) different visual ideas that are NOT literal.



3. For EACH idea:

- Include a direct link to a real clip/image you found

- In 1–2 sentences, explain WHY you chose it and how it fits the line



Important:

Do NOT use AI tools for this. I am specifically looking for your personal thinking and taste.

description:
About the role

I'm a business and mindset coach with a rapidly growing Instagram account (growing by hundreds of followers per week). I need a highly organised, proactive VA to manage my Instagram community and ensure every person who lands in my world is followed up with properly.

This is not a content creation role. This is a detail-oriented, people-first community management role. You need to be fast, warm, and thorough.



YOUR CORE RESPONSABILITIES

Comment tracking

Go through every post and reel and check everyone who has commented

Cross-reference against the freebie delivery list — confirm they have received their lead magnet

If they haven't, send a DM with the freebie link using the script I'll provide. If they ahve send a message to say thank you and start a convo



DM inbox management & flagging

Review all DMs 

Flag anyone who has received a freebie and not replied further — add to a "warm lead" list

Flag anyone who has an active conversation going 

Keep a simple tracker (Google Sheet) updated with each person's name, status, and last action



General inbox triage

Identify DMs that need a personal reply from me vs. ones you can handle with scripts

Surface the top 5–10 high-priority conversations to me each day 



New follower outreach 

Every new follower gets a warm welcome DM (script provided)

Send within 24 hours of them following



What I'm looking for

Experience managing a personal brand or coaching account on Instagram

Excellent written English — warm, professional, conversational tone

Highly organised and self-managing

Comfortable with Google Sheets for tracking

Available daily (even just 1–2 hours), Monday to Saturday

Proactive — if you spot something I haven't thought of, you tell me



"Please note: as the account has grown by over 2,000 followers in the last 10 days, there will be an initial clean-up phase to work through existing comments, followers, and DMs before we move into a daily maintenance rhythm."



Hours & pay

Approx. 1–2 hours per day to start, increasing as the account grows

Please state your hourly rate when applying

This is an ongoing role with room to grow



To apply, please:

Tell me about a time you managed a community or inbox for someone else

Share any Instagram accounts you've supported (you don't need to share follower counts)

Confirm your availability and timezone

Write the words "leopard print" somewhere in your application so I know you've read this properly

title: Management Accountant
description:
Title: Management Accountant 

Salary: £24,00.00 per annum

Contract: Permanent



ABOUT US



Williams, Stanley & Co is a leading accountancy firm catering to a diverse range of clients in the hospitality industry, from high street chains to family-run cafes. Our company began with a mission to provide accurate and actionable financial insights to businesses, drawing from our founders’ own experiences in managing multiple rapidly growing ventures.



Driven by a commitment to customer-first accounting, we’ve assembled a team of experienced and trusted accountants who share our vision for excellence. With a strong emphasis on collaboration and expertise, our team operates seamlessly across different locations, including the UK, Philippines, Dubai and South Africa. 



ABOUT YOU:



Reporting to the Senior Management Accountant, the management accountant will be responsible for management accounting within our practice, specifically for our UK-based clients. This role requires the ability to liaise with and build strong relationships with both our US and UK clients. 



You will have the opportunity to interact with senior stakeholders, clients, and our leadership team, providing valuable exposure and experience. This role is designed for someone who is eager to mentor, develop and leave a lasting impact on our team and company. As we grow and continually enhance our client offerings, you will play a key role in driving these improvements, shaping the future of our practice, and advancing your own professional development. 



You are: 



• Experienced in a similar role with a strong accounting skillset and previous staff management/supervisory experience.

• Familiar with the hospitality industry, either in the practice or industry.

• Resilient and possess leadership style that emphasises leading from the front. 

• Eager to develop and be part of a fast-growing national practice.

• Capable of communicating effectively and partnering with Senior Management and other departments. 

• Fully versed with 4-4-5 reporting.

• Proficient in advanced Excel skills; experience with Xero is advantageous. 





RESPOSIBILITIES



• Supervise and assist with the completion of monthly management accountants and client meetings.

• Produce board packs for monthly management meetings.

• Manage a team of Management Account Assistants and Bookkeepers, and mentor new team members and direct reports.

• Supervise the bookkeeping function.

• Reconcile balance sheets at month-end, including bank and inter-company reconciliations, resolving discrepancies as necessary. 

• Produce and post monthly journals. 

• Maintain fixed asset registers for clients. 

• Prepare information for annual corporation tax schedules and assist the tax team. 

• Produce monthly and quarterly VAT returns/reconciliations.

• Assist with budget preparation.

• Assist with statutory audits and audit information across teams and disciplines. 

• Translate raw data into meaningful analytics and provide insights and advice for clients with varying levels of financial literacy. 

• Regularly communicate with clients management to provide accurate reporting data and implement solutions to improve profitability and efficiency. 

• Take ownership off accounting functions, ensuring all books are properly maintained and internal controls are in place for financial reporting accuracy and efficiency. 

• Advice clients on action plans during periods of limited cash flow. 

• Liaise with accountants to finalise year-end reporting or tax returns on behalf of clients. 

• Ensure all deliverables, including monthly accounts, audit packs, and other relevant reports, are delivered on time and in accordance with agreed SLA’s.

• Advise clients on the data within management accounts, educating them on using the information to drive decisions and strategies. 

• Maintain regular communication with clients to ensure continuous value addition.

• Act as a financial adviser to clients, offering support and advice for their business and decisions. 

• Prepare forecasts and budget for clients. 

• Review and maintain the aged debtors and creditors reports weekly, ensuring overdue balances are followed up and flagged to management, and process payment runs per agreed payment terms.

• Coordinate information flow between our back-office and clients.

title: Instagram Content Creator & Growth VA for Australian Slow Fashion Brand
description:
We are an Australian handcrafted crochet fashion brand. Every piece is made by hand by women artisans in Argentina. We sell premium slow fashion online and are expanding into boutique stockists across Australia.



We are looking for a creative, Instagram-savvy VA who can take ownership of our Instagram growth, from raw photos to published posts, engagement, and strategy. This is not a basic scheduling role. We need someone who understands fashion aesthetics, knows how Instagram's algorithm works, and can make our feed look beautiful and grow our following consistently.



What you'll own:

You will edit and prepare raw photos into polished, on-brand Instagram posts using images we provide. You will write captions in our brand voice, warm, minimal, and authentic slow fashion tone. You will design text slides and carousel posts in Canva using our brand colours and fonts. You will schedule and publish 3 to 4 posts per week via Meta Business Suite. You will do daily engagement, 15 to 20 genuine comments on target hashtags and accounts. You will reply to comments and DMs within a few hours. You will research trending audio for Reels. You will send a weekly report covering follower growth, best performing post, and engagement rate.



What we provide:

We will give you raw photos from a professional photoshoot, brand colours, fonts and logo files, a content calendar with post themes and directions, caption review and approval before posting, and a full creative brief and brand guidelines.



Requirements:

We are looking for someone with proven experience growing an Instagram account for a fashion, lifestyle, or e-commerce brand. Please include examples or a portfolio with your application. You must have a strong eye for fashion aesthetics — your edits must look premium, not generic. Excellent written English with a natural, non-robotic tone is essential. You must be proficient in Canva and Meta Business Suite, familiar with Instagram algorithm, hashtag strategy and Reels best practices, reliable, proactive, and a clear communicator. Manual engagement only — no bots or automation tools.



Hours: 10–15 hours per week

Budget: USD $150–250 per month

Start: Immediately



To apply:

Please send 2 to 3 Instagram accounts you have managed or grown with results if possible. Include one example post you would create for a slow fashion brand with caption and hashtags. Tell us your favourite slow fashion Instagram account and why you like it. Include your availability and timezone.

title: Senior Crowdfunding Growth Manager (Proven Kickstarter Success Required)
description:
Overview:

I am an author and entrepreneur launching my book Surviving Through Negativity as part of a global movement.



We are building a crowdfunding campaign from scratch on Kickstarter with a target of $250,000–$275,000, and I am looking for a proven crowdfunding operator who can:

 • Build and launch the campaign

 • Drive funding through outreach, partnerships, and high-ticket opportunities

 • Operate independently with minimal supervision

This is NOT a virtual assistant role.?This is a senior-level, performance-based position focused on generating real revenue.



Compensation:

 • $10,000 bonus if $250,000 goal is reached and funds are successfully received

 • $15,000 bonus if $275,000+ is reached and funds are successfully received

 • No upfront payment

 • No payment if campaign does not reach $250,000



 This is a high-risk, high-reward role designed for someone confident in delivering results within a 30–60 day timeline.



Responsibilities:

 Kickstarter Campaign (From Scratch)

 • Build and publish campaign on Kickstarter

 • Rewrite and optimize campaign copy (story, positioning, offer)

 • Structure reward tiers (including high-ticket tiers $1K–$10K+)

 • Optimize conversion flow and campaign layout



Content Optimization

 • Review existing campaign video and images

 • Improve messaging, hook, and call-to-action

 • Reposition assets for higher conversion



 Revenue & Growth Execution

 • Execute daily outreach (100+ contacts/day):

  

• Sponsors

• Entrepreneurs

• Influencers

• Strategic partners

• Generate and manage qualified leads

• Book calls and support closing opportunities

• Secure high-ticket backers ($1K–$10K)

• Identify sponsorship opportunities ($5K–$20K)



Campaign Management

 • Track performance and optimize daily

 • Manage campaign updates, urgency, and messaging

 • Maintain follow-ups and pipeline tracking



Pre-Launch Requirement (Critical):

The campaign must be structured to achieve:  30–50% of total funding within the first 48 hours of launch

Candidates must demonstrate experience or strategy in:

 • Securing pre-launch commitments

 • Building early 
ntum

 • Driving high-conversion launch sequences



Campaign Reference Access:

Selected candidates will be given access to previous campaigns.

You are expected to:

 • Analyze past campaign performance

 • Identify gaps and missed opportunities

 • Rebuild a stronger, higher-converting campaign



Initial Evaluation Task (Required):

Shortlisted candidates must:

 1 Review a past campaign

 2 Provide:

 3 specific improvements to increase conversions

 4 Recommended reward tier structure

 5 Strategy to reach $250K–$275K

 6 Only candidates who demonstrate real strategy + execution thinking will be considered.



Key Expectations:

 • Operate independently with minimal supervision

 • Execute with speed, urgency, and accountability

 • Provide daily activity updates

 • Focus strictly on revenue generation—not vanity metrics



Ideal Candidate (Strict Requirements):

 • Must have successfully launched and funded at least one Kickstarter campaign

 • Experience raising $50K+ preferred (higher is better)

 • Strong background in:

 • Crowdfunding strategy

 • High-ticket sales or sponsorships

 • Business development / growth

 • Strong copywriting and conversion mindset

 • Fast communicator and highly responsive

 • Comfortable working in a performance-only compensation structure



To Apply:

Applicants MUST provide:

 1 Links to Kickstarter campaigns you have launched

 2 Funding results (goal vs. amount raised)

 3 Your specific role in those campaigns

 4 Your strategy to reach $250K+ in 30–60 days

 5 Confirmation you are comfortable with a performance-only model



 Applications without proof of successful campaigns will not be considered.



Final Note:

 Only apply if you have proven crowdfunding success and revenue-generation experience.?This is not a beginner or support role.

title: TikTok Video Editor (UK Market)
description:
We are looking for a TikTok Video Editor to join our team and support our fast-growing fashion business. This role is ideal for someone who understands the UK TikTok market, loves short-form content, and has strong editing skills in women’s fashion and menswear.

Pay



$2–$4 per hour

Performance-based bonus available

:

title: Graphic Designer & Canva Specialist
description:
About Simply Media & Co.



About Us

Simply Media & Co. is a strategy-first marketing and communications agency working with healthcare, non-profit, and community-based organizations. We create thoughtful, accessible, and visually compelling materials that support health promotion, community engagement, and real-world impact.

We value clarity, collaboration, and high-quality work over high-volume output.



About the Role

We’re looking for a skilled Graphic Designer with advanced Canva expertise who can take complex content and turn it into clear, engaging, and professional visual materials.

This is not a template-only role—we’re looking for someone who can think critically, work independently, and bring strong design judgment to every project.



Key Responsibilities

Design & Production

• Design a wide range of materials, including: 

o Posters, rack cards, brochures, and reports 

o Social media graphics and campaign assets 

o Presentations and toolkits 

• Translate written content into visually clear, easy-to-understand layouts 

• Maintain brand consistency across multiple client projects 

• Develop Canva templates and organize brand kits 

• Prepare print-ready files (bleeds, margins, resolution, etc.) 

• Manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment



What We’re Looking For

• 5-7 years of graphic design experience 

• Advanced Canva skills (required) 

• Strong layout, typography, and visual hierarchy skills 

• Experience designing for both print and digital 

• Ability to work independently with minimal direction 

• Strong attention to detail and organization



Nice to Have

• Healthcare or non-profit experience 

• Adobe Creative Suite experience 

• Knowledge of accessibility (AODA, WCAG) 



Working Style

• Able to manage multiple deadlines across different clients 

• Comfortable working in a collaborative, fast-paced agency environment 

• Some overlap with Eastern Time working hours required 



How to Apply

Please include:

• 3–5 samples of your work (preferably content-heavy designs like reports, posters, or social media campaigns) 

• A short note explaining your role in each project 



*Applications without work samples will not be reviewed.

Support Specialist to join our team and help deliver 

outstanding service for a fast-growing international 

e-commerce brand in the health and wellness space.



You'll be the first point of contact for our customers, 

handling inquiries across
, live chat, and social 

media — all managed through Gorgias, our helpdesk platform.



This is a long-term, part-time remote position 

(approximately 30 hours per week) with flexible scheduling 

and room to grow into a full-time role as the brand scales.





ABOUT THE BRAND

We are an international e-commerce brand that sells 

health and wellness products. Our customers are primarily 

based in the US, UK, and Europe. The brand is growing 

fast and we are looking for a dedicated support team 

member to grow with us.





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

- Respond to customer inquiries via
, live chat, 

  and social media (Instagram,
)

- Handle order-related questions: tracking, shipping 

  status, delivery issues

- Process return and refund requests following our SOPs

- Manage cancellation requests

- Handle PayPal disputes and chargebacks professionally

- Use Gorgias macros and tags to keep tickets organized

- Escalate complex issues to the team lead when needed

- Maintain a high CSAT score and fast response times

- Collaborate with the team via Slack





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Must-Have:

- Excellent written English (C1 level or higher) — this 

  is non-negotiable, our customers are native English 

  speakers

- At least 1-2 years of customer support experience in 

  e-commerce

- Experience with Gorgias (or similar helpdesk: Zendesk, 

  Freshdesk, Re:Amaze)

- Experience with Shopify (navigating orders, customer 

  profiles, fulfillment status)

- Ability to handle difficult customers calmly and 

  professionally

- Reliable internet connection

- Own laptop or PC with working webcam



Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with health, wellness, or supplement brands

- Experience handling PayPal disputes or chargebacks

- Familiarity with Slack

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing tools





SCHEDULE & HOURS

- Part-time: approximately 30 hours per week

- Flexible scheduling — we'll find a schedule that works 

  for both sides

- Must be available for at least some overlap with 

  European business hours (CET)

- Potential to grow into full-time as the brand scales





WHAT WE OFFER

- Competitive salary (based on experience)

- 100% remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

- Long-term position with a growing brand

- Full training and onboarding provided (SOPs, macros, 

  workflows — everything is documented)

- Supportive team environment via Slack

- Opportunity to grow into a senior or team lead role





HOW TO APPLY

If this sounds like a great fit for you, please include 

the following in your application:



1. A short introduction about yourself and your 

   experience in e-commerce customer support



2. Your experience with Gorgias and/or Shopify — 

   please be specific (which brands, how long, what 

   you did)



3. Your English level and any relevant certifications



4. Your expected hourly rate in USD



5. Your available working hours and timezone



6. A short video (2-3 minutes, in English) introducing 

   yourself and explaining why you'd be a great fit for 

   this role



7. Please upload your video to Google Drive and share 

   the link with "Anyone with the link can view" 

   enabled. Alternatively, you can use Loom (loom.com) 

   or any other platform that allows us to view your 

   video without needing to download it or log in. Add the link into your message. 



Applications without the video will not be considered.



We review all applications carefully and will respond 

within 3-5 business days.



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Website Designer (Wix Specialist)
description:
About Simply Media & Co.

Simply Media & Co. is a specialized marketing and communications agency specializing in healthcare, non-profit, and community-based organizations. We design websites that are not only visually engaging, but also accessible, user-friendly, and grounded in real community needs.



Position Overview

We are seeking a skilled Website Designer (Wix Specialist) to lead the design and development of client websites using Wix. This role is ideal for someone who understands user experience, accessibility, and content-driven design, and can translate complex healthcare and community information into clear, intuitive digital experiences.



Key Responsibilities

We’re looking for a Wix Website Designer who understands user experience, content structure, and accessibility—not just visual design. You’ll lead website builds from concept to launch, translating complex information into intuitive digital experiences.



What You’ll Do

• Design and build responsive websites using Wix (Editor or Studio) 

• Structure websites for clear navigation and user journeys 

• Translate content into clean, readable, well-organized pages 

• Apply UX best practices to improve usability and engagement 

• Ensure accessibility and mobile responsiveness 

• Manage domains, integrations, and basic SEO setup 

• Troubleshoot and maintain websites 



What We’re Looking For

• 2–5 years of website design experience 

• Strong Wix experience (Editor or Studio) 

• Strong understanding of UX and content-driven design 

• Experience managing full website builds 

• Ability to work independently and problem-solve 



Nice to Have

• Healthcare or public sector experience 

• SEO and analytics familiarity 

• Basic HTML/CSS knowledge 



Working Style

• Detail-oriented and organized 

• Able to manage multiple projects 

• Comfortable working in a collaborative, fast-paced environment 

• Some overlap with Eastern Time required 



How to Apply

Please include:

• 2–3 Wix websites you’ve built (live links required) 

• A short explanation of your role in each project 



*Applications without portfolio links will not be reviewed.

title: Sales Closer
description:
We're urgently seeking someone to make sales calls, primarily targeting small local business owners. Our existing tea
mber is consistently setting 5-7 appointments daily, and we're now on the lookout for a dedicated representative to handle these appointments, conduct follow-ups, and ultimately seal the deal. As a new company specializing in website creation, SEO, content writing, and comprehensive solutions for local businesses to enhance their online presence, we're eager to welcome someone to join our team on a full-time basis.



The role involves a minimal amount of business research prior to making calls, but fear not – I'll guide you through all the necessary details.



We're specifically seeking an individual fluent in English, unafraid to confidently discuss financial matters. If you have any queries or concerns about the position, don't hesitate to get in touch. I'm here to address any questions you may have.



To express your interest, kindly submit your resume along with a compelling explanation of why you're the ideal fit for this role. Please include #Swuple2 in the subject line of your
.



It's worth mentioning that our team already includes an outstanding member from the Philippines, and we're excited about expanding further. I'm looking forward to getting to know you better and extending a warm welcome to our team!



If you would, please provide a voice recording of yourself to better help us make our decision, as well as briefly answer the following questions:



How many sales have you successfully closed thus far? How many do you think you would be able to close each week?

How do you do working through the night? What excites you about this role?

title: CAD Drafter
description:
CAD Drafter – AutoCAD  – Remote



The CAD Drafter will prepare detailed shop drawings and technical drawings based on provided project information and markups. The ideal candidate is highly experienced in AutoCAD, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a production environment.



Key Responsibilities



Prepare and revise detailed CAD drawings and shop drawings

Interpret architectural and technical drawings

Produce accurate layouts and fabrication drawings

Maintain drawing standards, layers, and file organization

Implement revisions based on project feedback

Coordinate with project managers and team members



Required Qualifications



Strong experience using AutoCAD

Experience creating shop drawings or production drawings

Ability to read and interpret construction drawings

High attention to detail and accuracy

Strong English communication skills

Reliable internet connection and workstation suitable for CAD work



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with fabrication or construction-related drafting

Experience with ACM panels, metal cladding, aluminum window systems, or similar assemblies

Familiarity with North American drafting standards



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to an interview. A practical CAD drafting test will be required following the interview.

title: Built out my beautiful personal site on Showit and link it to the courses and funnels we need to build inside GoHighLeve
description:
Okay this could be a little confusing but this is why I need outside help to direct me to build my entire brand. Here is the general scope: my Social media is under my personal name and I have built a following there. I was looking to build two businesses at the same time: Manifest by Chans (which will have business courses, ebooks, live webinars, lending for business and private business growth and development mentoring) and Magnum Opus Collective (which will be ebooks, business lending, real estate lending, private money lending, investments and capital raising). 



I have started to built out my beautiful site on Showit, but was going to host the courses, funnels, etc in Kajabi or Gohighlevel. I really need help with someone that can first figure out how best to tie in everything under one site but then link to the different courses and second, help me create these pages and get then up and rolling as fast as possible. I am not sure if this is a scope of work that someone is interested in, but wanted to put it out there. Happy to pay hourly or by project. 



Also, whomever steps up to the plate to do this, I would assume would be great and someone I would love to keep around to help me maintain any and all of the backend work on these sites and customer facing items. 



A bonus if you can take my ideas on branding and create them for me as well.

Thank you!

title: Video Editor (Real Estate & Social Media Content)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced and highly creative Video Editor to join our team, producing high-quality content across real estate, social media, and digital advertising.

This role is ideal for someone who understands not just how to edit—but how to create content that captures attention, tells a story, and drives action.



About the Role

You’ll be responsible for editing a wide range of video content, including:

- Property listing videos (cinematic + fast-paced walkthroughs)

- Social media content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- Paid social media ads (Meta-focused, performance-driven creatives)

- Vlog-style and behind-the-scenes content

You’ll work closely with our marketing team to bring ideas to life and ensure all content aligns with brand, strategy, and performance goals.



Key Responsibilities

- Edit engaging, high-quality video content across multiple formats and platforms

- Structure videos with strong hooks, pacing, and storytelling to maximise retention

- Optimise content for performance (especially for paid ads and short-form platforms)

- Add motion graphics, text overlays, music, and sound design where required

- Colour grade and ensure consistent visual quality across all content

- Turn around edits efficiently while maintaining a high standard

- Collaborate with the team on creative direction, concepts, and improvements



Requirements

- Proven experience editing property, social media, and ad content

- Strong understanding of short-form content and attention-grabbing hooks (first 3 seconds)

- Ability to adapt editing style depending on the goal (branding vs conversion)

- Proficiency in editing software (e.g. Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro)

- Strong sense of pacing, music selection, and storytelling

- Experience with captions, subtitles, and social-first formatting (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)

- Ability to take feedback and iterate quickly



Bonus (Highly Valued)

- Experience working with real estate brands or agencies

- Understanding of Meta Ads creative strategy

- Basic motion graphics or animation skills

- Experience editing UGC-style or direct-response content



What We’re Looking For

- Someone who takes ownership and pride in their work

- Detail-oriented with a “nothing goes out unless it’s right” mindset

- Fast, reliable, and able to meet deadlines

- Creative thinker who brings ideas—not just execution



To Apply

Please submit:

A portfolio or examples of relevant work (property videos, ads, social content)

A brief introduction about your experience

Your availability and turnaround times
