title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”



Final Note



We are building a disciplined qualification system, not a sales operation.

The right person will value clarity, consistency, and clean decision-making.

title: Medical Biller: Superbill Forms (Out-of-network Reimbursement) + Innetwork
description:
We're seeking an experienced medical biller, specializing in out-of-network reimbursements and superbill processing, AND processing in-netowrk forms. 



The ideal candidate will be skilled at maximizing insurance reimbursements for patients through strategic coding and documentation.Must be very experienced. 



Key Responsibilities:

-Research and apply appropriate ICD-10 codes to optimize reimbursement

-Communicate directly with insurance companies to verify benefits and coverage (phone calls) 

-Navigate various insurance portals and documentation requirements

-Maintain current knowledge of out-of-network billing practices and requirements (you should know where to look for updates / how to research denials)

- Work with our clearinghouse systems (Claims MD) 

-Ideally has experience with our EHR, Healthie 



Required Skills:



-Strong understanding of medical billing, particularly out-of-network processes

-Expertise in ICD-10 coding and insurance reimbursement strategies

-Excellent phone communication skills

-Detail-oriented with strong research abilities

-Ability to adapt to new software systems



Experience with Healthie EHR is a plus but not required. The position requires a self-motivated individual who can effectively advocate for maximum patient reimbursement while maintaining compliance with insurance requirements.



TO APPLY:  send note with full resume + 1-2 sentences explaining your experience billing

title: Simple Audio Dubbing/Editing
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Audio Dubbing Specialist.



Job Description



Your main task will be to synchronize (dub) Spanish (ES) and French (FR) voice-over audio files to match a German (DE) reference audio. You don´t need to know the languages in order to participate if you can read simple audio timelines.



Each chapter consists of:

1 German reference audio file (DE)

1 Spanish audio file (ES)

1 French audio file (FR)

In one project there will be around 20-50 chapters. I work on 1-2 project weekly. Hopefully more in the future.



Your goal is to ensure that the ES and FR audio files are perfectly timed to match the German audio.



-Align ES and FR voice-over audio to match the DE reference timing

-Work with audio sections (usually split into 3 parts)

-Adjust timing within sections (move segments forward/backward as needed)

-Ensure natural flow and clean transitions

-Deliver high-quality, precisely synchronized audio files



Requirements

-Experience with audio editing/dubbing (e.g., Audacity, Adobe Audition, or similar)

-Strong attention to detail and timing

-Ability to follow instructions and SOPs

-Reliable and able to meet deadlines



Training / SOP

-A detailed SOP video will be provided upon request



To apply, please:

-Request the SOP video

-Complete a short sample test task

-Submit your finished sample for review

title: Long-Term Voice Over Artist for YouTube (Consistent Work + Growth)
description:

- Matching tone/style to top business documentary channels

- Company Man

- MagnatesMedia

Pay

- $30 per video

- Or $250 for 8 videos

With the possibility of a bonus based on video performance

Open to negotiation for well experienced candidates



Requirements (Must-Have)

2. High-quality recording setup (no background noise/echo)

3. Fast turnaround (?48 hours)

4. Strong storytelling ability (this matters more than just a “nice voice”)

5. eliable and responsive



To Apply (Read Carefully)

1. Send 2–3 relevant voice samples (YouTube/documentary style preferred)

2. Include the word “Documentary” at the top of your proposal (filters out spam)

3. Briefly explain your experience with similar content



Applications without samples or the keyword will be ignored.



Bonus Points

- Experience with YouTube channels

- Understanding of pacing, retention, and audience engagement

- Ability to take direction and improve over time



We’re not just hiring a freelancer—we’re looking for a go-to voice for our channel.



If that’s you, apply now.

title: Project Manager & Marketing Coordinator
description:
Part-Time Project Management & Marketing Coordinator (Remote, 25 hrs/week)

mbers

s (clean, professional layouts)

mbers

 - Reliable, responsive, and proactive



Strong Bonus (Highly Preferred)

 - Advanced Asana experience with structured, premium workflows

 - Process-driven mindset — you improve systems, not just follow them



How to Apply (Read Carefully — This Filters Out Candidates)

Build a sample project in Asana for this scenario:



You are managing a marketing
 campaign from start to finish.

 content

 - Designing the
 in Mailchimp

 analytics performance

Tasks

Owners

Dependencies

Timeline

You MUST demonstrate:

How you structured the workflow

How you ensure deadlines are met

How you manage approvals and prevent delays



Applicants who have not completed Step 1 & 2 will be ignored.



If you are someone who can bring structure, clarity, and execution to fast-moving marketing projects — we want to hear from you.

title: Financial Controller / Bookkeeper for Live E-Commerce Auction Business
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for a highly detail-oriented tea
mber with a strong financial background in accounting, bookkeeping, cash flow management, and profitability analysis to help support our fast-paced live auction e-commerce business.



This role is for someone who understands how to keep a business financially organized on a daily basis and can help us make smarter decisions by tracking the numbers closely.



You will help us monitor the health of the company by making sure our cash flow, inventory, payroll, scheduling, and profitability all stay aligned. We want to know, on a daily basis, where the business stands financially, what is working, and what needs to change.



Key Responsibilities:



• Manage bookkeeping and maintain accurate financial records

• Track daily, weekly, and monthly cash flow

• Build and maintain financial projections and budget forecasts

• Monitor business profitability and margins

• Review inventory-related numbers to make sure products, costs, and cash flow are aligned

• Oversee payroll support and scheduling-related financial tracking

• Help identify waste, inefficiencies, or areas where profitability can improve

• Create reports and dashboards so leadership can understand the business clearly

• Make sure financial data is accurate and organized for decision-making

• Support overall financial planning for a growing e-commerce company



Ideal Candidate:



• Strong background in accounting, bookkeeping, finance, or financial analysis

• Experience with e-commerce businesses, inventory, and cash flow management

• Understands profitability, margins, budgeting, and forecasting

• Can turn raw financial data into simple, clear insights

• Very organized and detail-oriented

• Proactive and able to spot problems before they get worse

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets and financial software

• Strong English communication skills

• Reliable, honest, and consistent



Bonus if you have experience with:



• Live selling or auction-style e-commerce businesses

• Inventory-heavy businesses

• Payroll coordination

• KPI reporting and dashboards

• QuickBooks, Xero, Google Sheets, Excel, or similar tools



What we need from you:



• Help us understand our numbers on a daily basis

• Help us improve profitability

• Help us keep inventory, payroll, and cash flow under control

• Help us create a financially disciplined business that can scale



To Apply:

Please send:



• A short summary of your accounting/bookkeeping/finance experience

• Any experience you have working with e-commerce businesses

• The financial software and tools you’ve used

• Examples of reports, forecasting, or budgeting work you’ve handled

• Why you think you’d be a good fit for this role



Important:

Please include the phrase “Profit First” in your submission title so we know you read the full job post.

title: Content Creator (Full-Time, Remote) — AI Rendering Startup
description:
ONLY APPLICANTS WHO FILL OUT THIS GOOGLE FORM WILL BE CONSIDERED.



FORM:







We're hiring a full-time Content Creator to a face and creative engine behind Auto Render AI — an AI-powered rendering platform used by architects, real estate professionals, and home builders to turn sketches into photorealistic renders and cinematic videos in minutes.



We're a small, fast-moving startup with a product people love and a content machine that needs building. This isn't a "post and pray" social media role. You'll be the person on camera showing the world what AI can do for the architecture and real estate industries. You'll learn the product inside-out, create tutorial and demo content daily, and directly drive downloads and paid conversions [+ be rewarded with commission].



What you'll do:

? Create 1-2 short-form videos per day (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) — tutorials, before/after demos, workflow walkthroughs, and trending format content 

? Appear on camera to present tutorials and product demos 

? Manage and grow our Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube presence 

? Research competitor content, trending formats, and viral hooks in the AI/architecture space 

? Edit all your own videos (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci — whatever you're fastest with)

? Repurpose content across platforms (Reel ? Short ? TikTok ? ad creative) 

? Work directly with the founder to execute on content direction, ICP targeting, and creative strategy 

? Own your content calendar and posting schedule



What we're looking for:

? You want to be a part of a start up from the early days

? You live on Instagram/TikTok/YouTube and understand what makes content perform 

? Comfortable and natural on camera — no strong accent when speaking in English 

? You can go from idea to published video fast — speed matters more than perfection 

? Strong video editing skills — you handle the full pipeline from filming to posting

title: Real Estate Acquisitions (+Bonuses!)
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

title: Meta Ad Creator (Images) – Performance E-commerce (Health & Beauty)
description:
Experienced Meta Ad Creator (Images) Wanted for Fast-Growing Dropshipping E-Commerce Brand (Health & Beauty)



We are an ambitious, fast-growing dropshipping e-commerce company active in the health & beauty space. We test new products daily and are constantly launching new ad angles.

To support our growth, we’re looking for a high-level Meta Ad Creator (Images) who understands what makes static ads convert.



If you know how to turn ideas, data, and market insights into scroll-stopping image ads, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do



• Create high-performing static image ads for Meta 
 & Instagram).

• Adapt and translate winning ads to different markets (language, culture, offers, hooks, formats).

• Research competitors and winning creatives using the Meta Ad Library and similar tools.

• Develop new ad concepts, hooks, and angles based on product benefits, psychology, and trends.

• Create multiple iterations of winning ads (hooks, visuals, copy variations).

• Understand and apply direct-response principles (UGC-style images, problem–solution, social proof, before/after, etc.).

• Work closely with our media buyers to optimize creatives based on performance data (CTR, CPA, ROAS).

• Maintain a fast production pace without sacrificing quality.



What We’re Looking For



• Proven experience creating Meta image ads that convert (e-commerce / dropshipping experience is a big plus).

• Strong understanding of consumer psychology, hooks, and ad angles.

• Ability to quickly spot winning trends and translate them into original creatives.

• Skilled with tools like Photoshop, Figma, Canva, or similar.

• Experience with localization and adapting creatives for international markets.

• Performance-driven mindset: you care about results, not just aesthetics.

• Ability to work independently and take ownership.



What We Offer



• Competitive pay, based on experience and performance.

• Fully remote work with flexible hours.

(You can work 8h/day, 7 days a week if you want — depending on workload.)

• A young, driven, performance-focused team that moves fast and values results.

• Long-term collaboration and growth opportunities as we scale aggressively.

• Direct feedback loop with media buyers so your work actually improves performance.



Ready to Go All-In? Apply Here



Send us:

• A short introduction about your experience.

• Examples of your best-performing Meta image ads.

• Mention the word “green” somewhere in your message so we know you read the full description.

• Your portfolio and/or a short video introduction of yourself (optional but highly appreciated).



We only consider candidates who are serious, experienced, and ready to make an impact.

title: Senior Accountant / Finance Manager (SME)

?

This is a long-term ongoing role managing the finance function across our businesses. You will handle the full range of bookkeeping and accounts tasks, while also helping management stay on top of cashflow, reporting, payroll, and general financial administration.



?



Day-to-Day Responsibilities

 • Bank and account reconciliations

?



Higher-Level Responsibilities

 • Monthly financial reporting to management

 • Variance analysis and general business performance insights

 • Management reporting and KPI tracking

?



You Must Have

 • Strong working knowledge of Australian bookkeeping and accounting requirements, including BAS, GST, and STP

 • Xero proficiency — essential

 • Experience with payroll systems such as Employment Hero, Xero Payroll, or similar

 • Experience working with an Australian small-to-medium business

 • Excellent English and clear communication skills

 • High attention to detail and ability to work independently

 • Strong organisation and reliability

 • Construction, trades, or project-based business experience highly regarded



?



Highly Regarded (Bonus)

 • Experience with JobPac construction accounting software

 • Experience in construction / subcontractor-based businesses

 • Familiarity with project costing and job tracking systems



?



Hours & Timezone



This is a full-time ongoing role, generally Monday to Friday during Australian business hours, with some flexibility for the right candidate.



?



To Apply

title: Creative Ad Creator for Meta
description:
About the role

We're a fast-growing dropshipping brand in the health & beauty niche. We launch new Meta ads every single day and are looking for a driven creative ad creator to join our team. You're the link between our creative briefs and what actually goes live, from generated visuals to ads that perform in Meta Ads Manager.



What you'll do

Work with AI-generated visuals in Higgsfield (Nano Banana) using detailed prompts we provide.

Critically evaluate the generated output and select the images with the highest conversion potential, based on visual quality, scroll-stopping power, and audience fit.

Edit and finalize creatives when needed, adjusting text, fixing spelling, tweaking layouts, using tools like Canva, Photoshop, or similar.

Independently manage your daily planning so all creatives are ready before the set launch time each day, no exceptions.

Proactively experiment with new concepts: different formats, hooks, visual styles, always with performance as your north star.



What we're looking for

Creative eye

You can tell mediocre from potential, even when the output is AI-generated.

AI & design tools

Experience with Higgsfield, Midjourney, or similar tools. Comfortable editing in Canva, Photoshop, or equivalent.

Self-discipline

You work remotely, own your schedule, and never miss a deadline.

Speed without compromise

Daily output is non-negotiable, you move fast without sacrificing quality.

Health & Beauty feel

Affinity with the niche helps, you understand the audience and what triggers them.



What we offer

100% remote, work from wherever you want

Clear briefs and prompts, no guesswork, we give you the structure

A fast-scaling brand with multiple active products across markets

Competitive rate, we pay well for great work, no lowballing

Long-term collaboration, we're not looking for a one-off, we want someone to grow with us

Room to grow and contribute to the overall creative strategy

title: Copy Director
description:
Circle of Greatness is seeking a highly strategic and performance-driven Copy Director to lead all copy across our
, SMS, funnel, and website marketing ecosystem.



This role is responsible for owning messaging across the entire customer journey — from first touchpoint to conversion. You will manage and mentor junior copywriters, collaborate directly with partners, and ensure every piece of communication aligns with both brand voice and revenue goals.



The ideal candidate is both creative and analytical — someone who understands how to craft compelling messaging and optimize it across funnels, campaigns, and web experiences.



Key Responsibilities

Copy Leadership & Strategy



Own and oversee all copy across
, SMS, funnels, and website pages

Define messaging frameworks, campaign angles, and conversion strategies

Guide and develop junior copywriters on tone, structure, and execution

Set clear standards for what “high-performing” copy looks like





Quality Control



Review, edit, and approve all outgoing copy across campaigns and web assets

Ensure consistency in brand voice across all platforms and partners

Maintain a high bar for clarity, persuasion, and conversion effectiveness





Performance & Optimization



Analyze performance across campaigns and funnels (open rates, CTR, conversions, revenue)

Identify winning messaging patterns and scale them

Continuously test, iterate, and optimize copy across
, SMS, and web pages

Use data to inform creative and strategic decisions





Client & Partner Management



Act as the primary copy lead for 4–5 key partners

Collaborate on campaign, funnel, and offer strategy

Ensure all deliverables align with partner goals and expectations





Campaign & Funnel Execution



Work closely with junior copywriters to produce high-quality campaigns and funnel assets

Oversee copy for landing pages, sales pages, and key website touchpoints

Support launches for promotions, events, and marketing initiatives

Ensure all copy is delivered accurately and on time





Requirements



Proven experience in copywriting and managing copy teams, preferably in digital marketing

Strong expertise in
, SMS, funnel, and website copywriting

Track record of writing or directing copy that drives measurable results (revenue, conversions)

Experience mentoring or managing junior tea
mbers

Ability to balance creative direction with data-driven decision-making

Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

High attention to detail and commitment to quality





Nice to Have



Experience working in fast-paced, high-growth or entrepreneurial environments

Experience managing multiple brands or partners simultaneously

Familiarity with tools like GoHighLevel, Klaviyo, Postscript, Attentive, or similar platforms

Understanding of direct response marketing and funnel strategy



What Success Looks Like



Campaigns and funnels consistently improve in open rates, CTR, conversions, and revenue

Website and funnel copy clearly communicates value and drives action

Messaging is consistent, compelling, and aligned across all channels

Junior copywriters are producing higher-quality, conversion-focused work

Copy becomes a core driver of revenue growth for Circle of Greatness





Apply

title: Technical Project Manager (Coding Experience Required)
description:
We're focused on automation!



Looking for a highly organized, proactive, and technically capable Technical Project Manager to help lead projects across software, systems, and operations. This person will act as the bridge between business goals and technical execution, keeping projects moving while also understanding the code, technical constraints, and implementation details well enough to communicate effectively with developers and spot issues early.



This is not a purely administrative PM role. We want someone who can manage timelines, priorities, and people, while also being comfortable reading code, discussing architecture, troubleshooting technical blockers, and occasionally helping with light hands-on technical work when needed.



ABOUT US:

We are the largest salsa & bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and are always expanding.



Busy times!



The culture here is FUN and friendly. Our goal is to make every student feel welcome and completely taken care of all the time.



Dancing changes lives - we are on a mission to deliver the best salsa/bachata educational experience on Earth.



The company is MaS Dance Academy.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 • Own project planning, execution, and delivery across technical initiatives

 • Create clear timelines, priorities, milestones, and accountability across teams

 • Coordinate developers, designers, stakeholders, vendors, and leadership to keep projects on track

 • Translate business needs into organized technical requirements and actionable tasks

 • Run project meetings, status updates, sprint planning, and follow-ups

 • Identify blockers, risks, scope creep, and dependency issues early

 • Read and understand code enough to communicate effectively with developers and validate progress

 • Help review technical implementations for alignment with business goals

 • Support QA, testing, launch coordination, and post-launch follow-through

 • Improve internal systems, workflows, documentation, and project management processes

 • Help ensure technical work is completed accurately, efficiently, and with strong attention to detail



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 • Proven experience as a Project Manager or Technical Project Manager

 • Strong technical background with the ability to understand software development workflows

 • Coding experience in at least one language such as JavaScript, Python, PHP, SQL, or similar

 • Ability to read code, follow technical conversations, and work closely with developers

 • Experience managing multiple projects, deadlines, and stakeholders at once

 • Strong organizational skills and follow-through

 • Excellent written and verbal communication

 • Strong problem-solving ability and comfort operating in fast-moving environments



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

 • Experience working with APIs, integrations, databases, and web applications

 • Familiarity with Git, version control, and developer workflows

 • Experience in Agile, Scrum, or similar project management frameworks

 • Experience with QA processes, bug tracking, and technical documentation

 • Ability to assist with light technical troubleshooting or implementation when needed



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 • Someone who is both technical and operational

 • Someone who can keep people accountable without needing constant supervision

 • Someone who notices details, follows up consistently, and prevents things from slipping through the cracks

 • Someone who can earn the trust of developers because they actually understand technical work

 • Someone who can turn messy ideas into organized execution plans



NICE TO HAVE

 • Experience in a startup or entrepreneurial environment

 • Experience managing contractors or remote teams

 • Experience improving systems and building better workflows from scratch





SCHEDULE

9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday





COMPENSATION

Compensation is based on experience, skill level, and fit.





 APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:



1. A brief intro about yourself. Include technical project management experience



2. Can you work the hours requested?



3. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit)



5. What coding education or experience do you have? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, React Native, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?)



6. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!









---------

Search: VA , virtual assistant , executive assistant , code , python , javascript , C , C+ , C++ , Deluge , API , AI , A.I. , artificial intelligence, llm , automate, automation , zoho , crm , deluge , make , n8n , zapier , react , react native , pm , project manager , management , mgmt

title: Virtual assistant for phone calls
description:
Virtual Medical Assistant (US-Based Endocrinology Practice)



We are seeking a reliable and professional Virtual Medical Assistant based in the Philippines to support our busy US medical practice. Preferably physicians or experienced healthcare professionals. 



Position Type



Full-time preferred (Part-time applicants may be considered)



Work Schedule



Monday–Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

1-hour lunch break



Responsibilities



- Answer patient messages in clear, professional English

- Respond to basic medical questions appropriately

- Triage patients based on urgency and route concerns correctly

- Send messages to the appropriate staff members or providers

- Assist with general administrative and clinical support tasks



Requirements



- Excellent written and spoken English (clear communication required)

- Prior experience working with a US-based medical company

- Experience in the medical field required (clinic, hospital, telehealth, etc.)

- Understanding of medical terminology and patient triage

- Professional, reliable, and detail-oriented

- Comfortable handling confidential patient information



Preferred Qualifications



- Experience with EMR/EHR systems

- Background in endocrinology, primary care, or internal medicine

- Full-time availability during CST business hours



We are looking for someone professional, dependable, and able to communicate confidently with patients in English.



If interested, please submit your resume along with a brief description of your experience working with US medical practices.



Please answer the following questions clearly and in complete sentences.



1. Describe your experience working with US-based medical practices. Include the name of the practice, your role, and how long you worked there.

2. What EMR/EHR systems have you used? Describe your level of comfort with them.

3. Do you have experience responding to patient messages? If yes, what type (portal messages,
, phone triage)?

4. How do you determine whether a patient message is urgent, non-urgent, or emergency?

5. Give an example of a time you had to handle a difficult patient conversation in English.

6. Are you available Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST?   (Please specify availability.)

- Full-time

- Part-time



7. What is your expected monthly salary (in USD)?

8. Do you have a quiet home office setup with stable high-speed internet? Please describe your setup.

9. Why are you interested in working with a US endocrinology practice?



Perfect — here is the revised Short Skills Test with the updated thyroid rash scenario.



Short Skills Test



Please respond exactly as you would if you were working in our medical practice. Use professional, clear English. Assume you are communicating through a patient portal.



Scenario 1: Possible Medication Reaction



A patient messages:



"I started the new thyroid medication 5 days ago and now I have developed a rash on my arms and chest. It is itchy."



1. Write your response to the patient.

2. Is this urgent, non-urgent, or emergency?

3. What would you do internally (routing, documentation, escalation)?



Scenario 2: Urgent Concern



A patient messages:



"My blood sugar has been over 350 since last night even though I took my insulin. I feel nauseous."



1. Write your response to the patient.

2. What level of urgency is this?

3. What would you do next?



Scenario 3: Administrative Routing



A patient messages:



"I need a refill for my Ozempic. My pharmacy says they sent a request but haven’t heard back."



1. Write your message to the patient.

2. Who would you route this to internally?



Thank you

title: AI Content Creator for Christian Children’s Workbook (ChatGPT Specialist)
description:
Job Title:

AI Content Creator & Designer for Christian Children’s Workbook (ChatGPT Specialist)



Job Description:

We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented AI Content Creator to help develop a Christian children’s workbook using ChatGPT. This role involves transforming existing workbook concepts into original, copyright-safe content by leveraging AI tools.



You will take inspiration from existing children’s workbook pages (e.g., activities, puzzles, reflection questions, scripture exercises) and use ChatGPT to generate new, unique variations of similar content. The goal is to maintain the educational and spiritual value while ensuring all material is fully original.



In addition to content generation, a key part of this role is designing visually appealing workbook pages. You must be able to aesthetically arrange text, illustrations, and activities so each page looks polished, engaging, and child-friendly.



Responsibilities:



Analyze existing workbook pages for structure and activity types

Use ChatGPT to generate original, copyright-safe questions, exercises, and activities

Adapt content to be age-appropriate, engaging, and aligned with Christian values

Design and format workbook pages with strong visual appeal (layout, spacing, imagery)

Incorporate graphics, icons, and illustrations in a clean, cohesive style

Ensure consistency in tone, style, and design across the workbook

Iterate and refine content based on feedback



Requirements:



Active ChatGPT Plus (or equivalent premium AI tool) subscription

Strong graphic design skills (Canva, Adobe, Figma, or similar tools)

Ability to create clean, engaging, child-friendly page layouts

Strong prompt-writing skills and understanding of how to guide AI outputs

Strong English writing and editing abilities

Familiarity with Christian teachings, Bible stories, and children’s education

Attention to detail and ability to follow content guidelines



Nice to Have:



Experience creating educational materials for children

Background in teaching, curriculum design, or religious education

Illustration or visual storytelling experience



Project Scope:

Ongoing project with multiple workbook pages to be created. Potential for long-term collaboration if a strong fit.



Goal:

Create a fully original, visually engaging Christian children’s workbook that feels professionally designed and spiritually enriching.

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
About the Role

We are a private-pay in-home senior care agency based in Texas. We operate two locations and are actively growing. The CEO is looking for a sharp, reliable Executive Assistant to take ownership of his calendar, inbox, and internal documentation so he can stay focused on running the business.



This is not a task-list role. The right person thinks ahead, catches things before they become problems, and communicates clearly without needing to be chased. You will work directly with the CEO every day. Your job is to protect his time and keep his operation running clean. You will be required to do 1 to 2 daily video meetings per day with the CEO to align on tasks. 



What You Will Own

Your three primary responsibilities are calendar management, inbox management, document and SOP creation in addition to a variety of other items. On the calendar, you own the schedule completely, you book, reschedule, protect, and organize it. Nothing slips through because you let it. On inbox, you triage, flag, draft responses, and keep things from piling up. On documentation, you use AI tools to help create and maintain Standard Operating Procedures, organize files in Google Drive, and prepare clean written materials the team can actually use.



You will use Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Drive), RingCentral for messaging and calls, and AI tools including Claude and ChatGPT daily. If you have never used AI tools to write or improve documents, this role is not a fit.



What We Are Looking For

Written English is the first filter. If your application has grammar errors, we will not move forward. This role requires clear, professional communication every day with the CEO, with vendors, other staff and in documents that represent the company.

Beyond that, we want someone who takes initiative. If you see something that needs to be done and it is within your scope, you handle it and report back. You do not wait to be told twice.



To apply, read this carefully: In your application message, begin with the phrase "Montebello Ready" at the very top. Then in 3–5 sentences, tell us about a specific time you managed a busy executive's calendar or inbox and what system you used to stay organized. Do not send a generic cover letter. Applications that do not follow these exact instructions will not be read.



Compensation and Schedule

This is a full-time remote position. You will work Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Central Time. Compensation is $8–$15 per hour depending on experience, paid via OnlineJobs.ph.

title: Senior Customer Support VA — Shopify + Zendesk Specialist (6+ Years Required)
description:
We're looking for ONE senior customer support virtual assistant for our health & wellness eCommerce brands.



If you've spent years inside Zendesk and Shopify — not months, YEARS — managing subscriptions, processing refunds, retaining customers, and handling high-volume ticket queues with speed AND empathy… this role was written for you.

We run brands similar to Resilia and Rosabella. Our support operation handles subscription-based health products where customers need clear, warm, confident communication — and where every interaction matters. You'll be managing refund requests, subscription cancellations, order inquiries, and retention conversations daily.



This is NOT for beginners. Please do not apply unless you meet every requirement below.



What You'll Be Doing Every Day

You'll open Zendesk, work through a queue of customer tickets, and handle each one with precision and warmth. Here's what that looks like in practice:

— A customer writes in saying they didn't authorize a subscription charge and threatens to dispute. You calmly acknowledge the confusion, explain how the subscription was created at checkout, offer to cancel immediately, and present a retention option (pause, skip, adjust schedule) before they leave. If they insist, you process the cancellation gracefully and offer a comeback discount code.

— A customer wants a full refund on a recent order. You check the order details in Shopify, offer a partial courtesy refund first (no return needed), and if they push back, you escalate to a full refund as a one-time exception — all while keeping the tone warm, understanding, and never defensive.

— A customer is worried they've been enrolled in a subscription they didn't want. You look up their order, confirm whether it's a one-time purchase or subscription, and reassure them with specifics. You use their first name. You make them feel heard.

— A customer wants to cancel but hasn't given the product enough time. You gently encourage continued use by sharing specific benefits, remind them the subscription is flexible (pause, skip, adjust), and provide a direct link to the customer portal. If they still want to cancel, you do it — no friction.

Every response you write should feel personal, specific to the customer's situation, and never robotic. You sign off with your name, the brand name, and "Customer Support." You treat every customer like they're the only one in the queue.



Required Experience — Non-Negotiable

— 6+ years of hands-on experience with Zendesk (ticket management, macros, automations, views, reporting)

— 6+ years of hands-on experience with Shopify (order management, refunds, subscription lookups, customer accounts)

— Direct experience with subscription management platforms: Checkout Champ and/or Loop Subscriptions

— Proven track record supporting health, wellness, or supplement eCommerce brands

— Experience handling subscription retention flows: cancellation requests, pause/skip offers, comeback incentives

— Experience processing refunds (partial and full), managing disputes, and de-escalating frustrated customers

— Comfortable maintaining 20+ tickets per hour at high quality and accuracy

— Native-level or near-native English writing skills — grammar, spelling, and tone must be flawless



What We Provide

— Pre-built Zendesk macros — your workflows are already structured, you just need to execute them with the expertise to know when and how to personalize

— ChatGPT workspace — we've built a custom AI workspace to help you craft and refine messages quickly

— Clear SOPs and escalation paths — you won't be guessing, but you do need to bring the judgment that only comes with years of experience

— Hubstaff time tracking — we track activity and ticket output to maintain our quality standards



What We're Looking For in You

— You've done this before. Not something similar — THIS. Shopify orders, Zendesk tickets, subscription management, refund processing. You should be able to step in and handle our queue from day one with minimal ramp-up.

— You care about accuracy. Every refund amount is correct. Every subscription status is verified before you respond. Every customer name is spelled right. Details matter to you.

— You care about quality. Your responses read like a real human who genuinely wants to help — because you do. You don't copy-paste the same template for every customer. You adjust your tone, your offer, and your approach based on what the customer actually said.

— You're hungry and motivated. You want to win. You want to be the best support agent on the team. You take pride in a clean queue, happy customers, and zero errors.

— You're fast without sacrificing quality. 20 tickets per hour is the baseline, and every single one should be accurate, warm, and complete.



Compensation

We start at $6/hour and we are very willing to pay significantly more for the right person. If you bring 6+ years of real Zendesk + Shopify experience, a portfolio of brands you've supported, and references that confirm your quality — name your rate. We'd rather pay more for one exceptional person than save money on someone who needs training.



How to Apply

Do NOT just send a resume. We want to hear from you directly. Please answer every question below in your application:



Your full name

Your
, phone number, and any social profiles (LinkedIn, etc.)

Which country are you based in?

How many years have you used Zendesk professionally? Describe your experience in detail — what types of businesses, ticket volume, features you've used (macros, automations, triggers, views, reporting).

How many years have you used Shopify professionally? Describe your experience — order management, refund processing, subscription apps, customer account management.

Have you used Checkout Champ and/or Loop Subscriptions? If yes, describe exactly what you did with them.

List the specific eCommerce or health/wellness brands you've provided customer support for. Include the brand name, how long you worked with them, and what your responsibilities were.

What is your average ticket-per-hour rate at high quality? How do you maintain accuracy at speed?

Are you comfortable with Hubstaff time tracking?

What is your desired hourly rate?

Why are you the right person for this role? If you're able to do something most support VAs can't — tell us. Sell yourself here.





We're hiring ONE person. We're not looking for the most applicants — we're looking for the RIGHT one. If that's you, we can't wait to hear from you.

title: Chargeback & Dispute Manager – Full-Time Remote
description:
Dispute Manager

Women's jewelry brand · 40 hrs/week · Flexible hours



About us

We are a growing women's jewelry brand operating fully online. Our team is remote, results-driven, and fully Filipino — you will be working alongside a team of talented Filipino professionals in an online environment. We take ownership of our work and move fast. We are now looking for a sharp Dispute Manager to own our chargeback process end-to-end.



What you'll be doing

Managing and resolving chargebacks and payment disputes from start to finish

Writing strong dispute responses to maximize our win rate

Tracking dispute trends and flagging patterns to prevent future chargebacks

Keeping accurate, organized records of all cases and outcomes

Communicating directly with payment providers on open cases

Continuously improving our dispute process and internal documentation

Requirements

Minimum 2 years of experience in a dispute or chargeback role

Must have worked at an e-commerce company processing $300,000+ per month in revenue

Hands-on experience with Reamaze or similar helpdesk tools

Strong knowledge of chargeback reason codes and payment provider portals

Able to work fully autonomously — no micromanagement here

Excellent written English communication skills

Detail-oriented with a process-driven mindset

Nice to have

Experience with multiple payment providers and their dispute portals

Background in fraud prevention or risk management

Familiarity with Shopify or similar e-commerce platforms

What we offer

100% remote position with flexible working hours

Stable full-time role (40 hours/week) with a fast-growing brand

A collaborative team of Filipino professionals you can grow with

Real ownership of your role — your results matter and are recognized

Long-term opportunity as we continue to scale

How to apply

Record a 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself and briefly covering your experience with chargebacks and disputes. That's all we need — no CV required.



Send your Loom link when applying.



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed — no exceptions.

title: Non QM Loan Processor - Assistant
description:
Funding is a U.S.-based private money lending company that provides short-term, asset-based loans to real estate investors. We focus on first- and second-position loans, bridge funding, gap funding, and creative real estate transactions.



We value clean execution, capital protection, and professional communication.



Role Overview



We are hiring a Loan Processor/ Jr. Underwriter to support real estate deals from intake through funding. This role is the operational backbone of our lending business and works directly with borrowers, brokers, and internal leadership.



This is not a bank mortgage role. You will support private money deals using CRM pipelines and internal workflows.



Key Responsibilities



Manage real estate deals inside the CRM.

Collect, organize, and review borrower and property documents.

Assist with preliminary deal review (LTV, ARV, exit strategy – no approvals)

Prepare deals for internal review and decision-making

Communicate with borrowers and brokers via
, phone, and chat

Request missing documents and follow up to keep deals moving

Coordinate with title companies and insurance providers for closings



Track conditions, timelines, and closing tasks

Maintain clean CRM records, notes, and document uploads

Assist with light lead follow-up and deal intake

Important Authority Boundaries







Requirements

2+ years experience in real estate transactions, loan processing, or lending support

Strong attention to detail and organization

Excellent written and spoken English

Comfortable communicating with U.S.-based clients

Ability to manage multiple deals at once

Experience using CRMs and pipeline-based systems



Nice to Have (Not Required):

Private money or hard money lending experience

Familiarity with real estate investing terminology

GoHighLevel or similar CRM experience



What Success Looks Like

Clean, accurate CRM records

Deals move smoothly with minimal rework

Borrowers feel informed and supported

Leadership does not need to fix or chase files



How to Apply

Please apply with:

Please submit your resume along with a brief introduction explaining your relevant experience and why you’re an excellent fit for this role. Include the word “Lending" in your application message so we know you read this fully.

title: AI Video Production Specialist  (Veo 3 + Nano Banana + ElevenLabs) Hiring Immediately
description:
AI Video Production Specialist



(Veo 3 + Nano Banana + ElevenLabs)

Hiring Immediately



About The Role



I run growing social media brands in the beauty, haircare, and holistic health niche.



We create AI-generated holistic avatar short form content using:



• Google Flow (Veo 3)

• Nano Banana (AI image generation)

• ElevenLabs (AI voice generation)

• CapCut



Our content focuses on:



• Strong retention hooks

• Educational storytelling

• Consistent AI avatar identity

• Natural voice delivery

• Clean, minimal editing



I am looking for a full time AI Video Production Specialist who already has experience producing this style of content.



This is not an entry-level editing job.

You must already understand AI avatar workflows and retention-driven short form content.



I am hiring immediately.



Position Structure



Full time

Monday through Saturday

Flexible schedule as long as weekly production targets are met



Salary: $400–$500 USD per month (based on experience and skill level)



Performance-based bonuses will be provided when production targets, quality standards, and account growth milestones are consistently achieved.



Performance review after 3–6 months with opportunity for base salary increase and expanded responsibilities.



High performers who demonstrate ownership, consistency, and creative contribution will have long-term growth opportunities within the production team.



Production Expectations



We operate using a production unit system based on workload complexity.



• Full 90–120 sec Veo 3 holistic avatar build = 2 units

• 45–60 sec AI voice + Nano Banana + edit build = 1.5 units

• Simple AI voice build (minimal visuals) = 1 unit

• Hook-only variation / optimization = 0.5 unit



Weekly Target: 35–40 production units.



Some weeks will focus on full builds.

Other weeks will focus on hook testing and optimization.



Quality and attention to detail are required for every submission.



What You Will Do



• Generate Veo 3 clips using structured prompts

• Generate AI images using Nano Banana

• Generate voiceovers using ElevenLabs

• Maintain avatar consistency (voice, clothing, tone, pacing)

• Ensure holistic avatar style remains consistent across scenes

• Edit final builds in CapCut (clean, minimal style)

• Add captions accurately

• Followscript breakdowns precisely

• Double check all details before submission

• Maintain organized Google Drive workflow



In the future, you may:



• Improve hooks

• Suggest retention optimizations

• Assist in script refinement

• Manage the full AI production workflow from start to finish



Required Experience



• Proven experience creating holistic health AI avatar short form content

• Experience generating Veo 3 clips

• Experience using Nano Banana or similar AI image tools

• Experience generating voice using ElevenLabs

• Strong CapCut editing skills

• Strong English comprehension

• Strong attention to detail



You must understand avatar continuity, pacing, and short form viewer retention.



Huge Plus



• You already have active access to Google Flow (Veo 3)

• You already have access to ElevenLabs

• You already have access to Nano Banana

• You have managed full AI production workflows before



How To Apply



To be considered:



Send links to 3 holistic AI avatar style videos you personally created

Huge plus if you can share views your content has generated on IG/FB

List the AI tools you currently have access to

Share your internet speed

Tell me how many full 90–120 sec AI builds you can realistically complete in 8 hours

Briefly explain how you maintain avatar and voice consistency across multiple scenes



Include the word “HOLISTIC” in your message so I know you read everything.



Only applicants with relevant portfolio examples will be considered.



Hiring immediately.

description:

title: Amazon sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: Content Coordinator
description:
JOB ANNOUNCEMENT



Advance Chiropractic and Performance



My name is Dr. Derek Huddleston. I’m a Chiropractic Sports Physician and I own a high-value, concierge, movement based wellness clinic called Advance Chiropractic and Performance. My mission is to keep 100,000 people out of surgery in Central Arkansas. In order to do that, I need help in building a solid marketing approach. My small team is looking for an A player for the Content Coordinator role! 



I need you to edit and schedule social content and help me develop a repeatable content execution system!



At its core, this is not a strategy role.  I’ll handle messaging direction but I want and need your input. Your job is to take what we discuss, ask questions for clarity and get it done.



READ THIS. IT MAY SAVE BOTH OF US TIME.



If your natural style is very cautious, slow to act, or requires a high level of structure before starting, this role will not be a good fit.  If you’re someone who gets things done without making it complicated, this will be a good fit. 



If your
/application reads like it was written by AI, it will not be considered.



Application Process



Step 1:

Do not reply on onlinejobs.ph 

Check out the job announcement below

Step 2: You’ll receive the job description with steps to follow

Step 3: Test task w/ time limit



What you’ll do

Help me organize and execute a social content strategy, which includes a content pillar

Edit content using Edits and Instagram tools

Use Meta to schedule and manage content

Use AI tools for generating captivating social content and
s in my voice from a custom bot

Help launch content campaigns 
s, social, in-office)

Track your numbers associated with engaging content

Track your numbers associated with your Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

What success looks like

Content goes out on time with minimal touchpoints

We develop an organized way to streamline transfer of content and messaging 

We get more booked calls from people engaging with the content

You know the numbers associated with engaging content



What it’s like working with me

I move fast, I think out loud, I will change direction when needed

I don’t micromanage. If I trust you, I expect you to handle your role

I’m not going to hand you everything perfectly organized. We will need to talk through the process until we find a good solution

You’ll need to think a little and figure things out

If you need constant direction or slow pace, this won’t work

If you like moving and getting things done, you’ll be fine

I care about execution, not titles

At some point, you will be asked to do things outside of your job description. If you’re not okay with that, do not apply.



I’m looking for someone who

Moves fast and takes action without overthinking

Operates without needing constant direction

Asks clarifying questions, then executes

Looks for answers on their own

Communicates clearly and directly

Takes ownership of outcomes

Works hard and stays humble

This is NOT for you if

You overthink everything

You argue instead of trying to understand

You move slow because you want everything perfect



Tools you’ll use

GHL

Instagram / Meta

Edits

Canva

ChatGPT



Requirements

English must be strong (written and verbal)

Go High Level experience at the level of being able to create and schedule
 campaigns.

title: E-Commerce Customer Support Agent – Supplements
description:
E-Commerce Customer Support Agent – Supplement Brand (US, UK, CA, AU, NZ, IE)



About Us

We're a 7-figure e-commerce supplement brand selling across the US, Canada, UK, Australia, New Zealand, and Ireland. We run a lean, fast-moving operation with a large international team — and we're looking for a reliable Customer Support Agent to join us long-term. This is an ongoing daily role, not a one-time project.



???? Important: This Role is NOT For You If…

You don't have direct, proven experience in e-commerce or dropshipping customer support. We need someone who already knows how to handle tickets, refunds, order inquiries, and shipping issues without hand-holding. If that's not you, please don't apply.



???? Who We're Looking For

A sharp, responsive customer support agent who:

* Has verifiable experience in e-commerce / dropshipping customer support

* Can respond to all customer inquiries within 3–4 hours max

* Has strong written English skills (non-negotiable — you'll be communicating with customers across the US, UK, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and Ireland)

* Is available every single day (7 days a week), working approximately 2 hours per day

* Can start immediately

* Bonus: Experience with Reamaze (
) and/or Spa
 — not required, but a strong plus

* Bonus: Has experience with subscription-based store support (retention flows, cancellation handling, rebill inquiries)



???? Your Day-to-Day Responsibilities

* Respond to customer
s and tickets within 3–4 hours

* Handle order status inquiries, refund/return requests, and shipping questions

* Escalate issues when needed, following established SOPs

* Maintain a professional, friendly tone that reflects well on the brand

* Track and report recurring customer issues or product feedback

* If experienced with subscriptions: help manage subscription inquiries, cancellations, and retention



???? Compensation

* Starting rate: $3–$8/hr depending on experience and skill level

* Performance-based: rate can increase up to $10/hr for outstanding work — or adjust down based on performance

* This is a long-term position with room to grow within our team



???? How to Apply — Read This Carefully

Your application must include ALL of the following or it will not be reviewed:

1. A short Loom video introducing yourself, your experience, and why you're a good fit

2. SOPs from past roles — share actual standard operating procedures you've used or created in previous CS positions

3. Proof of past work — chat screenshots, support ticket examples, and the names of brands/stores you've supported

4. If you have subscription support experience: include any SOPs, guides, or workflows you built or used

5. Your available hours per day and your timezone



We're hiring NOW — apply today and be ready to start immediately.

title: YouTube Video Editor / Channel Assistant —Part- Time
description:
Hey there!



I'm looking for a full-time virtual assistant to work on my YouTube channels. This is a long-term position, 20hours per week, at $350/month.



What you'll be doing



My team has built a tool that creates videos from scratch using images. The videos come out as about 60% images and 40% video footage — your job is to add video clips sourced from YouTube into the existing image-based edits. It's a straightforward process once you get the hang of it.



You'll also be given a Claude AI account with custom skills to generate scripts and thumbnails, so a lot of the creative heavy lifting is already handled for you.

Reliable internet and available to work Part-time

Previous experience managing a YouTube channel is a plus but not required



How to apply

Take this free IQ test: 
/iq-test/#culture-fair-intelligence-test — screenshot your results and attach them. Please don't cheat, it's there so I can see how you think, not to judge you.

title: YouTube Video Editor (American Football Channel)
description:
About Us

We are a YouTube channel focused on American football storytelling.

Our videos cover legendary players, dramatic rises and falls, iconic teams, forgotten careers, and unforgettable 
nts in football history. The goal is not just to recap facts. We create high-retention, documentary-style videos with energy, emotion, and strong storytelling.



We are looking for a skilled long-form YouTube editor who can take a script and voiceover and turn it into a polished, cinematic video that keeps viewers engaged from beginning to end.



What You’ll Be Editing

You’ll be working on videos such as:

•	Player stories and career breakdowns 

•	Team and season retrospectives 

•	Historical football recaps 

•	Rise/fall and legacy-style sports documentaries 



Examples of the style we want:







Your Role

We will provide the script and voiceover.

You will be responsible for editing the full video, including:

•	Selecting and inserting relevant football footage, highlights, photos, and supporting visuals 

•	Adding background music that enhances emotion and pacing 

•	Using sound design, transitions, motion graphics, and text overlays where appropriate 

•	Creating strong pacing, 
ntum, and narrative flow 

•	Adding titles, lower thirds, and on-screen text cleanly and professionally 

•	Building the final video so it feels like a mini sports documentary, not just a basic edit 

This role is for an editor who understands how to make a story feel bigger, sharper, and more watchable, not someone who only cuts clips together.



What We’re Looking For

•	Advanced editing skills in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or DaVinci Resolve 

•	Strong instinct for pacing, tension, storytelling, and viewer retention 

•	Experience editing for YouTube, especially faceless, documentary, or sports content 

•	Strong English comprehension and ability to follow detailed creative direction 

•	Resourceful footage sourcing and clip selection, not filler visuals 

•	Access to quality stock footage/music resources when needed 

•	Ability to deliver polished work on a 5-7 day turnaround 



Compensation

•	$70 per video to start 

•	Typical video length: around 15 minutes 

•	Typical volume: 4–6 videos per month 

•	Strong performance will lead to higher pay over time 

•	We are looking for a long-term editing partner, not a one-off freelancer 



Application Instructions

To apply, you must do all of the following:

1.	Start your message with the word Football 

2.	Send 2–3 of your most relevant editing samples

Best samples are sports, documentary, faceless, or story-driven YouTube content 

3.	Tell us your normal per-video rate 

4.	Tell us which parts of the process you personally handle: 

     o	footage sourcing 

     o	music 

     o	motion graphics 

     o	sound design 

     o	subtitles/text overlays 

     o	revisions 

5.	Confirm that you can meet a 5-7 day turnaround 



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Why This Is a Good Opportunity

•	Consistent monthly work 

•	Clear expectations and direct feedback 

•	Long-term growth opportunity 

•	Flexible schedule 

•	Opportunity to work on compelling football stories for a passionate audience 



If you love football, understand storytelling, and know how to edit videos that hold attention and create emotion, this could be a very strong fit.



We are looking for the right editor to grow with us long term.

title: Air Shipping Coordinator (Air Import/Export Specialist)
description:

We are a freight forwarding company based in Baghdad, Iraq, offering services to clients around the globe.

This is a fantastic opportunity for individuals aged 18 to 35 who are looking for a role that can be performed remotely from anywhere in the world or on-site in our Baghdad office.



Air Shipping Coordinator

You will be responsible for the full spectrum of air freight operations, handling both import and export services. Our focus is importing to Iraq and exporting from Iraq to other countries.

Key Responsibilities Include:

• Coordinate the entire shipping process for Air shipments.

• Manage assigned shipping processes, ensuring accurate and timely updates are entered into our system to maintain complete and reliable records.

• Conduct thorough reviews of quotes and rates before submitting them for supervisor consideration.

• Negotiate to secure the best possible rates in accordance with project needs.

• Collaborate effectively with colleagues and respond promptly to team inquiries.

• Demonstrate a commitment to high-quality work and continuous improvement.



Who We're Looking For (Requirements):

• Must have strong English speaking, writing, and understanding skills. No Arabic knowledge is required.

• Basic to moderate Excel skills are needed.

• Knowledge of ERP systems is a significant plus.



Compensation and Work Details

• 8 hours per day, will be negotiated and discussed during the interview.

• One day of leave per week.

Work Location and Training

title: Product Lister
description:
We're looking for a highly capable Product Lister who will take full responsibility for listing products across our E-commerce fashion dropshipping stores — fast, flawless, and optimized from day one.



This is not a role for someone who just copies and pastes product information. We're looking for a true A-player: someone who is disciplined, detail-oriented, proactive, and committed to excellence in every single listing they publish. You understand that a great product listing isn't just accurate — it drives organic traffic, supports paid advertising, and directly impacts store revenue.



You will be responsible for creating complete, high-quality product listings on Shopify daily. This means writing compelling product titles and descriptions, selecting the right tags, structuring collections correctly, and ensuring every listing is fully optimized — both for Google organic search and for Meta advertising performance. You work fast without sacrificing quality, and you catch your own mistakes before anyone else does.



You use AI tools such as ChatGPT to work smarter and faster, without letting it replace your own judgment and eye for quality. You know when a generated description needs refining, when a keyword isn't right, and when a listing simply isn't ready to go live.



You'll work closely with our creative designer, media buyer, and supply chain manager to ensure that listings are aligned with our ad creatives and product catalog at all times. You stay organized, communicate clearly through Slack and Google Workspace, and you keep up with the pace of a fast-moving fashion dropshipping operation.



We value people who take ownership, maintain high daily output, and continuously look for ways to improve the quality and efficiency of their work. This is not a side job or a temporary role. This is a position for someone who wants to grow with the company and become an essential part of a high-performing E-commerce team.



Please answer the following questions in your application:

1. What is your experience with product listing for Shopify fashion dropshipping stores, and for how long?

2. Have you worked for other fashion dropshipping stores before? If yes, which ones?

3. What are your main strengths, and how can you make the company better? What knowledge or ideas can you bring?

4. Are you familiar with Shopify, Google SEO listing optimization, and Meta-aligned product copy?

5. How do you use AI tools such as ChatGPT in your listing workflow? Please describe your process.

6. How many products can you list per day, and what does your quality control process look like?

7. Do you speak and write English fluently?

8. Are you currently working for another company?

9. How many hours and days per week are you available? Are you also available during weekends?

10. Do you always have a stable Wi-Fi connection?

11. What is your desired monthly compensation?

12. What's your favorite dish?



Please include your phone number in your application so we can contact you directly through WhatsApp!

title: ManyChat & Social Media Funnel Specialist
description:
We're a digital health and wellness brand running 12+ social media accounts across German, English, and Spanish markets. We need someone who lives and breathes ManyChat.



The Role



You'll own our entire ManyChat operation — building and managing automated flows across
 and Instagram (comment replies, DMs, story replies) for all of our accounts. The core of this role is constant optimization: split testing hooks, message copy, timing, and flow structure to improve open rates and conversions. Every contact that comes through ManyChat needs to be captured and synced to our
 team (Klaviyo) with proper tags so they can retarget. You'll monitor performance daily, fix what's broken, and keep testing to make the funnel better every week.



What We're Looking For

Someone with deep, hands-on ManyChat experience at scale — not just one welcome flow, but managing multiple accounts and high-volume comment automation. You understand funnel mechanics, you know how to integrate ManyChat with Klaviyo, and you have a testing obsession. Familiarity with Meta/Instagra
ssaging policies is a must. German-language experience and e-commerce/digital product background are a plus.



How to Apply

Send a short message with examples of ManyChat flows you've built and the results they drove. We care about what you've done, not your CV.



We will run new Split tests every 3 days, so this will be a part time job but we still need you to check in daily and report to us. But we expect you to work twice a week for a few hours.
