title: Google Ads Specialist (Lead Generation – Roofing & Solar)
description:
We are a growing roofing and solar company based in Vancouver, Canada. Our goal is to dominate the North Shore (North & West Vancouver) and expand into surrounding areas.



We are looking for a high-level Google Ads specialist who can build, launch, and optimize campaigns that generate real, high-quality leads.



This is a long-term role, starting with an intensive build phase and transitioning into ongoing management.



?? IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING



We use Time Doctor to track working hours, activity levels, and productivity

Time Doctor includes random screenshots during work sessions

You must be comfortable working with full transparency and accountability

You must have at least 2 hours of daily overlap with Vancouver time (PST)

This is a long-term position, not a short contract



???? ROLE STRUCTURE (2 PHASES)



Phase 1: Build & Launch (First 2–3 Weeks)



40 hours per week

Build complete Google Ads system from the ground up



Responsibilities include:



Campaign structure (Search + call-focused campaigns)

Keyword research (high-intent local searches)

Ad copy creation and testing

Negative keyword setup

Conversion tracking (GTM / GA4 / call tracking)

Landing page coordination and optimization



Phase 2: Ongoing Management (Long-Term)



20 hours per week

Focus on optimization, scaling, and performance



Responsibilities include:



Reducing cost per lead

Improving lead quality

Ongoing testing and optimization

Scaling campaigns into new areas



???? COMPENSATION



$8–$12 CAD per hour (based on experience)

Long-term stable role

Performance-based bonuses (see below)



???? PERFORMANCE BONUS STRUCTURE



Bonuses are based on:



Cost per lead (CPL)

Lead volume

Campaign stability over time



Example bonus structure (subject to adjustment):



Cost Per Lead Bonus



At or below target CPL ? bonus applies

Lower CPL ? higher bonus



Lead Volume Bonus



Higher number of qualified leads ? additional bonus



Stability Bonus



Consistent performance over time ? additional bonus



Bonuses are designed to reward:



High-quality leads

Efficient ad spend

Scalable, stable campaigns



Bonuses will not be paid if:



Lead quality is poor

Volume is reduced to artificially improve performance

Tracking is inaccurate or manipulated



? REQUIREMENTS



Minimum 3+ years Google Ads experience

Proven experience generating leads (not ecommerce)

Experience with local service businesses is a strong advantage

Strong understanding of:

Match types

Negative keywords

Bid strategies

Conversion tracking

Must be able to provide real results with numbers



???? DO NOT APPLY IF



You have only run small or test campaigns

You focus on clicks or impressions instead of leads

You cannot provide real results

You rely heavily on AI without understanding strategy



???? APPLICATION – REQUIRED



To apply, answer ALL of the following:



What is your typical cost per lead for a local service business?



Describe ONE campaign you improved:



Before (metrics):



After (metrics):



What changes did you make?



What monthly budget ranges have you managed?



Have you worked with local service businesses? If yes, explain.



How would you structure a campaign for:



“Roofing North Vancouver”



What would your first 14 days look like if hired?



How do you reduce cost per lead over time?



Have you set up conversion tracking? If yes, explain how.



Do you have experience with call tracking, landing pages, and A/B testing? Explain briefly.



Are you willing to use Time Doctor with screenshots during working hours? (Yes/No)



Can you commit to at least 2 hours overlap with Vancouver time daily? (Yes/No)



Are you available full-time for the initial build phase and then transition to part-time (20 hrs/week)? (Yes/No)



What is your expected hourly rate (USD)?



Provide links or examples of campaigns or landing pages you have worked on.



In 2–3 sentences, explain why you are a strong fit for this role.





Applications that do not follow instructions or do not include real experience will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who can build a system, generate real leads, and help us scale long-term.

This is a project-based role. Estimated timeline is 2–3 weeks. There is potential for ongoing work maintaining and updating the site after launch.



The Scope

We have an existing Squarespace site with 6 pages that need to be rebuilt or restructured. Some pages will be redesigned from existing content, some will be built from scratch. You will work within our current Squarespace account — no new site setup required.



What We Provide

 ? Complete copy for all 6 pages

 ? Logo files in multiple formats

 ? Reference sites for aesthetic direction

 ? Clear feedback and fast responses



What We Need From You

 ? Proven Squarespace experience — links to at least 2–3 Squarespace sites you have built (required)

 ? Clear communication throughout the project



To Apply

Include the word AGAPE in your application. Send your portfolio, links to Squarespace sites you have built, your flat project rate, and your available start date. Applications without portfolio links will not be considered.

title: WordPress Developer
description:
About VanDenBerg Web + Creative

We are a 25-year-old B2B web design and digital marketing agency based in West Michigan, USA. We build and manage WordPress websites for local businesses, manufacturers, nonprofits, and agribusiness clients across the country. Our team is small, experienced, and fully remote. We hold ourselves and our work to a high standard — and we are looking for a developer who does the same.



The Role

We are looking for a skilled WordPress Developer to join our team on a part-time contractor basis. You will work alongside our existing development team, taking on new site builds, client website edits, technical troubleshooting, and maintenance support.



This is a white-label agency role. You represent our agency in all deliverables. Quality, consistency, and professionalism are non-negotiable.



What You Will Work On

Building new WordPress pages and site sections from approved design briefs

Executing client website edits and mini-projects assigned through Asana

DNS configuration, nameserver changes, and hosting troubleshooting

Speed optimization, image optimization, and Core Web Vitals improvements

Plugin and theme conflict resolution

Site migrations including staging environments and DNS cutover

Schema markup and technical SEO implementation

Cloudflare configuration and security rules

Communicating with hosting support to resolve client account issues



What We Are Looking For

Technical Skills — Required

Expert-level WordPress including Divi, Elementor, Flatsome, and WooCommerce

DNS, domain management, and hosting environment troubleshooting

Site migrations and DNS cutover with minimal downtime

Speed and performance optimization — Core Web Vitals, caching, image compression

HTML, CSS, and basic PHP for custom modifications

Schema markup and structured data implementation

Cloudflare configuration



SEO Knowledge

Working knowledge of on-page and technical SEO best practices

Familiarity with Google Search Console and Ahrefs

Ability to identify and resolve indexing, crawl, and structured data errors



Design Judgment

Strong visual standards — you can see when a layout is wrong and fix it

Able to work from an established site style without needing design direction on every decision

Mobile-first thinking and responsive layout expertise



Work Standards

Extremely high quality bar — you take pride in craft, not just task completion

Self-directed — you work from a brief in Asana without daily oversight

Proactive communicator — you flag issues before they become problems

Minimum 4 hours daily overlap with Eastern Standard Time (EST)

Reliable internet connection and consistent availability during overlap hours



What We Offer

Consistent part-time contractor work with a stable, long-running agency

Clear task briefs — you will always know what is expected before you start

A team that respects your expertise and communicates well

Opportunity to grow hours and responsibilities as trust is established





How to Apply

Please submit the following with your application:

Two to three live URLs of WordPress sites you have built or worked on in the last 12 months — with a brief description of your role on each

A short description of a DNS or hosting issue you resolved and how you solved it

Your available hours and overlap with Eastern Standard Time

Your rate expectation within the posted range



Applications without portfolio URLs will not be considered.



NOTE FOR AGENCIES: This posting is for a direct contractor hire. Agency placements are not being considered for this role.

title: Outbound Validation Specialist

You will spend your time on the phone, reaching out to organizations to confirm that the decision-makers, titles, and contact details we have are 100?curate before they move into our sales funnel.This is a role for a professional communicator who enjoys the challenge of navigating complex organizations to get to the right person.

Resourceful & Independent: A self-starter who can work effectively in a remote environment and find creative ways to solve information gaps.

Resilience: Comfortable with the repetitive nature of outbound calling and the persistence required to uncover hard-to-find details.



Apply here - 



Qualifications

Industry Plus: Familiarity with the Hospitality sector, sales operations, or professional services is highly preferred.

Tech Proficiency: Comfortable using VOIP software, CRMs, and online research tools simultaneously.



Apply here -

title: HR & Admin Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a highly organized, detail-oriented HR & Admin Operations Specialist with excellent written communication skills to support a fast-growing, multi-location franchise education business in the U.S.



This is not a basic VA role — you will act as the operational backbone for HR, payroll coordination, onboarding, compliance, and administrative systems across multiple locations.



Your job is to reduce chaos, streamline workflows, and ensure clean execution across HR and admin functions as we scale.

 

Key Responsibilities



HR Operations & Employee Lifecycle

mbers (operations, finance, leadership)

 chaos by organizing and executing tasks efficiently

, Stax, and internal reporting workflows

Reporting & Process Improvement

Ideal Candidate Profile

Nice to Have

, Google Sheets (intermediate level)

Success Metrics

title: Expert eCommerce Customer Service & Social Media Specialist
description:
About Us



VK Commerce is a fast-growing eCommerce company operating across Europe and the English-speaking markets. We sell products through Shopify and are looking for an exceptional Customer Service Specialist to become a core part of our remote team. You will handle both customer support and social media management across our brands. This is a permanent, long-term position — not a short-term gig or a training opportunity.



The Role



You will be the front line of our customer experience, handling inquiries, complaints, refunds, and post-purchase communication through
 and social media. Your mission is to turn unhappy customers into loyal buyers, create efficient workflows, and ensure our customer experience is consistently world-class. This is not a call center job — it is a leadership role in managing brand communication, reputation, and customer satisfaction.



What You'll Own



• Manage and respond to customer tickets across
, live chat, and social media with speed and empathy.

• Handle refunds, returns, exchanges, and complaints professionally — de-escalating issues and turning negative experiences into positive ones.

• You must know how to turn unhappy customers into loyal buyers, create efficient workflows, and ensure the overall customer experience is world-class.

• Manage our Instagram and
 pages — upload scheduled posts, respond to comments and DMs, and maintain a consistent brand presence across all accounts.

• Maintain brand-aligned response templates and SOPs, and proactively improve them.

• Identify recurring customer issues and recommend process improvements to reduce ticket volume.

• Collaborate with the wider team on order-related questions, shipping updates, and post-purchase follow-ups.

• Manage customer interactions and social media presence independently with minimal supervision.



Requirements



• 2+ years of experience in eCommerce customer service or support management (non-negotiable)

• Proven track record of managing high volumes of tickets/messages daily with accuracy and empathy

• Deep working knowledge of Shopify and at least one of: Gorgias, Zendesk, or Freshdesk

• Excellent written English — your responses must be grammatically flawless and natural-sounding

• Strong de-escalation skills and ability to maintain a 5-star customer experience under pressure

• Ability to create and maintain SOPs and response templates

• Experience managing Instagram and
 business pages — comfortable uploading posts, engaging with followers, and handling DMs

• 100% reliable, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment



Why Work With Us



• Stable, long-term position with consistent weekly hours

• Full autonomy no micromanagement

• Opportunity to work on multiple successful stores across Europe and the

English-speaking markets

• Flexible schedule results matter more than hours

• Join a motivated, growth-driven eCommerce team with the tools and structure to succeed



Trial Period



You will complete a 3-day paid trial where we assess your speed and accuracy in handling real customer messages, your ability to write empathetic and brand-aligned responses, and your initiative in improving systems or templates. If you perform exceptionally, this becomes a permanent role with consistent weekly work and growth opportunities.



How to Apply — READ CAREFULLY



To be considered for this role, your application MUST include the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

• Subject Line: Start your application message with the words "CS Expert — [Your Name]" so I know you read this post carefully.

• Experience Summary: List the eCommerce brands or stores you have supported, the tools you used (Shopify, Gorgias, Zendesk, etc.), and the average daily ticket volume you handled.

• Customer Response Test: Write a professional, empathetic reply to the following customer complaint:



Customer
:

"I ordered a dress 2 weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived. I've
ed you 3 times and nobody responds. This is ridiculous. I want a full refund immediately or I'm filing a chargeback. Worst shopping experience of my life."



• Why You: In 2–3 sentences, tell me why you believe you can outperform most applicants in this role.

• Strong understanding of:

o Local SEO

o Technical SEO

o Link building strategies

• Fluent in English (written)

________________________________________

Compensation

• Performance-based bonuses for hitting ranking and lead targets

• Long-term opportunity with a growing company

________________________________________

 To Apply

 IMPORTANT

If you do NOT have direct experience ranking home buying / investor websites, please do not apply.

We are looking for someone who can come in and win immediately.

title: Virtual Assistant (Real Estate Media)
description:
Virtual Assistant role focused on both IG Method outreach and QC and delivery



We’re hiring a detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant to help with both real estate media delivery and Instagram outreach. This is a long-term, part-time opportunity (20-30hrs/week) with potential for full-time opportunity (40 hrs/week) with a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate media company. You’ll be joining a small but driven team that values communication, consistency, and initiative.



We’re not just looking for someone to complete tasks — we’re looking for someone who thinks critically, takes ownership, and genuinely enjoys being part of a high-performing, tight-knit crew. You’ll play a key role in helping our clients receive their content on time while also helping grow our business through strategic Instagram outreach.



Key Responsibilities



QC and Delivery

 • Review completed media (photos and video) to ensure quality and brand consistency

 • Follow detailed SOPs to deliver files to clients via Aryeo, Dropbox, or other platforms

 • Write clear editing instructions to send to our video editors

 • Track delivery status and notify the team of any issues or revisions

 • Help keep shoot orders organized and completed on time



Instagram Outreach (IG Method)

 • Execute daily Instagram outreach to real estate agents (we’ll train you on the method)

 • Engage with accounts, send personalized messages, and track follow-ups in Google Sheets

 • Assist with managing content creation and scheduling through Canva and Meta Business Suite

 • Support engagement and DMs to maintain brand presence

 • Help repurpose past content into reels, stories, or posts when needed



What We’re Looking For

• Dependable and consistent — no chasing required

 • Strong written English and comfortable with professional communication

 • Great attention to detail — especially with photo and video review

 • Familiar with social media platforms and Canva

 • Comfortable following SOPs while also identifying ways to improve them

 • Friendly, warm, and team-minded

 • Excited to work in a creative, fast-moving environment

• Willingness to Work in Eastern Time (8 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET): Since most of our clients are based in this time zone, we need someone who's ready to work when we are.

• A Positive Attitude: We're all about keeping things friendly and supportive, and we want you to be a part of that vibe.

• Flexibility & Adaptability: Every day might bring something new, so we need someone who can roll with the punches and tackle whatever comes their way.



Bonus Points For

• Experience with Aryeo, Dropbox, or other delivery platforms

 • Previous VA experience in a creative or real estate-based business

 • Canva Pro or basic editing knowledge for reels or short-form content

 • Knowledge of the real estate industry or marketing workflows

 • Past work with IG Method, lead generation, or DM-based outreach



Why You'll Love Working with Us:

• Supportive Team: We're here to help each other out, and we'll make sure you have everything you need to succeed.

• Room to Grow: As our business expands, If you are interested:



Send your resume, a screenshot of an internet speed test, and a video introducing yourself to 
 and we will reach out with next steps!

title: Real Estate Media VA – Quality Control & Delivery
description:
We are a professional real estate media company specializing in property photography, video, and marketing materials for real estate agents. Our team values accuracy, teamwork, and reliability. We’re passionate about helping agents showcase listings beautifully and efficiently.



We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to handle photo and video Quality Control (QC) and Delivery tasks. You’ll ensure all visual media meets brand standards, files are correctly named, and client orders are delivered smoothly and on time.



Key Responsibilities:

Review edited photos for color, exposure, and overall quality.

Check videos for smooth transitions, accurate branding, and correct music use.

Upload and deliver final content to clients via delivery portals (e.g. Aryeo, Dropbox, Box).

Ensure branding, logos, and links are accurate before sending.

Skills & Requirements:

Strong attention to detail and consistency.

Comfortable working with Google Drive, Dropbox, and file management systems.

Experience with Spiro, Aryeo, or similar platforms (preferred but not required).

Experience with Adobe Lightroom CC and Photoshop required. Bonus points for experience with Adobe Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve video editing software.

Real estate photo editing experience is a plus.

Reliable internet and a fast computer capable of running the required editing software.

Excellent written communication and time management.



Work Hours:

Timezone: EST

Days: Tuesday-Saturday preferred

Hours: 2-3 hours per day



Compensation:

$4-$5 per hour depending on experience



How to Apply:

Fill out a brief application form.

Share where you’re from, your background, and your experience with QC or media work.

Explain what being “detail-oriented” means to you.

Send your video link (Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube) and a screenshot of your internet speed with your application.

title: Acquisition Manager – Real Estate Investment Company (Sales Role)
description:
We are a fast-growing real estate investment company based in the United States that purchases 70+ single-family homes per year.

Our business is simple:

We buy houses as-is, renovate them, and resell for a profit.

We are looking for a hungry, high-performing Acquisition Manager to help us buy more houses.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing

This is a sales role at its core — your job is to build relationships, negotiate, and close deals.

You will:

• Speak with homeowners looking to sell their property 

• Call, text, and follow up with leads daily 

• Build relationships with wholesalers and buy their deals 

• Analyze deals and determine purchase prices (we will train you) 

• Write and submit offers (MLS + off-market) 

• Negotiate directly with sellers and agents 

• Follow up consistently to convert leads into deals 

• Close as many profitable deals as possible 

 Your success = how many houses you help us buy

________________________________________

Compensation & Growth

• Competitive base + performance bonuses 

• Significant upside based on deals closed 

• Opportunity to grow into a senior acquisitions role 

• Work directly with a high-volume real estate team 

________________________________________

Who We’re Looking For

Sales experience is REQUIRED. Real estate experience is NOT required.

You are:

• A strong communicator (written and verbal English) 

• Confident on the phone and not afraid to negotiate 

• Persistent with follow-up (this is where deals are made) 

• Competitive and results-driven 

• Organized and able to manage multiple leads at once 

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment 

Bonus (not required):

• Real estate experience 

• Experience in cold calling / phone sales 

• CRM experience (Podio, GoHighLevel, etc.) 

________________________________________

This Job Is NOT For You If:

• You are uncomfortable making calls 

• You don’t like sales or negotiation 

• You give up easily after 1–2 follow-ups 

________________________________________

This Job IS For You If:

• You love closing deals 

• You want to make money based on performance 

• You enjoy talking to people and solving problems 

• You are competitive and want to win 

________________________________________

How To Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, you MUST complete ALL of the following:

1. Written Answers:

• Describe your sales experience (especially phone sales) 

• What results have you achieved in past sales roles? 

• Why would you be a great fit for this position? 

2. Video Introduction (REQUIRED)

Record a short video (2–3 minutes) answering:

• Tell us about yourself 

• Your sales experience 

• Why you believe you would succeed in this role 

Applications without a video will NOT be considered.

________________________________________

About Us

We are a high-volume real estate investment company focused on:

• Buying distressed properties 

• Renovating homes 

• Creating value in the communities we operate in 

We move fast, close deals, and are looking for someone who wants to grow with us.

________________________________________

If you’re a closer and want to be part of a team buying dozens of houses every month — we want to hear from you.

title: Digital Operations Assistant (E-Commerce & Systems)
description:
The Opportunity:

Kumusta! We are a growing US-based commercial apparel network launching a physical B2B supply route (EZ Stitch) and an online storefront. I am a fast-moving Fil-Am founder, and I am looking for a sharp, proactive Digital Operations Assistant to be my true katuwang (right-hand operator).



I am not looking for a temporary gig-worker. I want a solid kababayan who takes ownership of their work. If you have that signature Panay/Visayan loyalty and hustle, you are exactly who I want on my team.



Time Commitment & Flexibility:

(Note: The job board only allows me to select a single number for hours, but expect a range of 10 to 15 hours per week). We care about output, not clock-punching. As long as your Square databases are built accurately and on time, you completely control your daily schedule.



Phase 1 Focus (The Square Ecosystem):

Your first 30–60 days will be completely focused on building our business inside the Square platform. You will build both the physical Point-of-Sale database for our delivery trucks AND the Square Online Storefront for our web customers.



    Data Architecture: Taking messy vendor spreadsheets and formatting thousands of SKUs (prices, variants, weights) into clean Square CSV imports.



    Storefront Design: Building out the Square Online website, organizing product categories, sourcing images, and ensuring the customer shopping experience is flawless.



    Resourcefulness: You will be expected to use tools like Google, ChatGPT, and Square Help Docs to figure out formatting rules and solve bottlenecks independently.



Baseline Qualifications (Who You Are):

I don’t care if you have a fancy degree. Self-taught problem solvers and side-hustlers are highly encouraged to apply. But you must meet this technical baseline:



    You already know exactly what a CSV file is and how to map data columns.



    You understand how E-Commerce variants work (Parent/Child relationships).



    You value clear communication and pakikisama. We work entirely within Google Workspace (Drive, Chat, Meet).



The Vision & Loyalty Bonus:

We reward hard work. If you crush this Phase 1 project, the goal is to expand your hours and transition you into a permanent Digital Operations Manager overseeing our broader national network with significantly higher pay. We take care of our own.



To Apply:

To prove you read this to the end, make the subject line of your application exactly: "EZ Stitch Square Operator - [Insert Your Favorite Color]".

title: Performance Ad Creative Designer
description:
We are hiring a performance focused graphic designer to create high converting static ads for a fast growing wellness brand. This is not a traditional design role. We are looking for someone who understands what makes ads convert, not just look good.



About Us:  We are Visp, a premium wellness brand behind the Elixir Mixer. It is a glass bottle with a built in electric whisk used for matcha, protein, greens, and more. Our content sits at the intersection of wellness, routines, aesthetic lifestyle, and high performance paid ads.



What You’ll Do

-Design static ads for Instagram and

-Turn winning concepts into multiple variations with new hooks and layouts

-Translate product features into clear and compelling benefits

-Iterate quickly based on performance

-Collaborate on creative direction and testing new angles



What We’re Looking For

-Experience designing creatives for paid social, especially Meta ads

-Strong understanding of hooks and conversion focused design

-Ability to create clean, simple, high performing ads

-Strong taste level with a premium aesthetic

-Fast turnaround and consistency



This Role Is Not For You If

-You only focus on making things look nice

-You do not have experience with paid ads

-You prefer slow, highly polished design over iteration



Details

-Remote

-Flexible hours

-Estimated commitment is 5 to 15 hours per week depending on workload and performance

-Compensation based on experience and quality of work, up to $15 per hour

-Freelance with potential to grow



Trial Task and Screening Questions

PS these jobs get a LOT of applications. Here’s a trial task to complete if you’d like:

Have you designed creatives specifically for paid social ads such as
 or Instagram

Yes or No

Create 2 static ad concepts for VISP using text only. For each concept include a hook headline, supporting text, a call to action, and a short explanation of why it would convert.

If a static ad is not performing, what are the first two things you would change and why

What tools do you primarily use for design

Write 2 different hook options for this product: a bottle that mixes matcha, protein, and greens with no clumps

Upon completion of the trial task, please include your answers in your application. Make sure to title your submission with "Mariana - TT COMPLETE" to indicate that you have successfully completed and included the trial task responses.

We are looking forward to reviewing your application. Good luck!

title: Customer Experience (CX) Manager & Client Success VA – Online Coaching Program
description:
We are The Social Blueprint, a high-level online coaching mentorship program. We help fitness

coaches scale their online businesses. We currently have around 200 active clients in our

community, and we are growing fast.

We are looking for a switched-on, highly organized, and deeply empathetic Customer Experience

(CX) Manager based in the Philippines to join our team full-time. You will be the bridge between

our clients and our coaching team (Zac, Charlie, and Jackie)



The Role

Your primary goal is simple: Make sure every single client feels supported, accountable, and

happy. You will not be coaching them on strategy — you will be managing their experience,

keeping them on track, and flagging issues to the head coaches before they become big problems.

You will be managing communications across three Instagram accounts, WhatsApp, and our

custom Blueprint Portal.

What You Will Do Every Day

• Inbox Management: Keep our three main Instagram accounts and WhatsApp at "Inbox Zero."

Answer basic FAQs, point clients to the right resources, and escalate complex coaching questions

to Charlie or Jackie.

• Proactive Accountability: You won't wait for clients to ask for help. You will run a daily audit of

our ~200 clients inside our Blueprint Portal. You will check if they are submitting their weekly

numbers, posting content, and attending group calls. If they are slipping, you will send them a

friendly but firm nudge via DM.

• Onboarding & Welcome Packs: Ensure every new client gets checked in properly. You will also

coordinate with our 3PL (logistics warehouse) in China to ensure physical Welcome Packs are

shipped to new clients, tracking the orders and making sure they arrive safely.

• Triage & Escalation: Act as the filter. If a client is frustrated, stuck, or hasn't attended a call in

two weeks, you will flag it immediately to the coaching team with full context.





Who We Are Looking For

• Fluent, Conversational English: You must be able to write DMs that sound natural, friendly, and

professional. No robotic or overly formal language.

• High Emotional Intelligence (EQ): You are great with people. You can tell when a client is

frustrated and know how to de-escalate a situation.

• Highly Organized: You will be tracking 300 people across different stages of their journey. You

need to love systems, checklists, and keeping things tidy.

• Proactive Problem Solver: If you see a problem, you don't just report it — you suggest a solution.

• Comfortable with Logistics: You aren't afraid to
 a factory or 3PL in China to chase down a

tracking number for a Welcome Pack.



Requirements

• Previous experience as a VA, Customer Success Manager, or Community Manager (preferably

for an online coaching business, agency, or course creator).

• Experience managing Instagram DMs and WhatsApp for a business.

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace.

• Flexible working hours (we are based in Australia, but as long as the daily audits and inbox

sweeps are done consistently, we are flexible on exact hours).



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)

We ignore all generic copy-paste applications. To prove you have read this job post and have the

attention to detail we need, please do the following:

1. Make the subject line of your application: "CX Manager - The Social Blueprint"

2. In your application, tell us about your previous experience managing clients or communities.

3. Answer this scenario: A client messages us on WhatsApp saying, "I'm really frustrated, I

haven't signed any clients this month and I feel like quitting." As the CX Manager, how would you

reply to them, and what would you do next? (Remember, you are not the coach, you are the CX

Manager).



4. Record a short Loom video (2–3 minutes maximum) and include the link in your application. In

the video, introduce yourself, tell us about your experience, and answer the scenario question

above out loud. This is non-negotiable: applications without a Loom video will not be

considered. This is how we assess your spoken English, communication style, and personality

before we ever get on a call.



SEND TO

title: TikTok Shop Affiliate Growth Manager
description:
Role Summary

We are hiring an Affiliate Manager (Manager level) to manage and grow our UK TikTok creator network across fashion & lifestyle brands (including women’s and men’s products). You will handle creator communication, weekly creator meetings, product selection support, and performance tracking to drive GMV growth.



English must be very good. Must have the experience in TikTok creators management.



Key Responsibilities



Manage relationships with UK TikTok creators (female and male creators): weekly check-ins/meetings and daily communication.



Help creators grow GMV, including:



Recommending high-potential products and content angles



Supporting posting consistency and performance improvement



Sharing campaign updates, commission changes, and key product priorities



Support product selection across women’s + men’s fashion and related lifestyle categories based on conversion potential, demand, and trend signals.



Track and report creator performance and growth metrics (GMV, video volume, CTR, CVR, sample-to-post rate, top products/creators).



Maintain creator tracking sheets/CRM and ensure data accuracy with weekly updates.



Coordinate internally with operations/content teams to ensure creators receive the right links, commissions, assets, and support.



Identify problems early (low posting, low GMV, product mismatch) and propose actionable solutions.



Build and execute a structured weekly creator growth plan.



Requirements



Fluent English (written + spoken) — confident hosting meetings and communicating professionally with UK creators.



Strong interest in fashion & lifestyle (women’s and men’s trends, styling, product positioning).



Minimum 1 year of e-commerce experience, preferably TikTok Shop; 



Strong product sense: can evaluate products and select “winners” using both data and market understanding.



Excellent communication, interpersonal skills, and stakeholder management.



Organized, data-driven, and consistent with follow-ups and reporting.



Nice to Have



Experience managing creators/affiliates/KOLs/MCNs.



Familiarity with TikTok Shop affiliate links, commission strategy, and campaign operations.



Working Hours



Remote role (Philippines preferred).



6–8 hours/day, with flexibility during the onboarding period.



Compensation



Hourly pay + bonus opportunities based on performance up to $250-$500



Salary review after 6 months based on KPI achievement.

title: Senior AI Automation Engineer (OpenClaw Expert)
description:
The Mission

You will be the first technical hire and "Lead Architect" for a multi-business AI portfolio based in the US. You will lead the development of a 100-agent ecosystem across four distinct business units (SEO/AEO, Vehicle Arbitrage, Real Estate, and Fintech). Your goal is to move beyond simple automation and build autonomous, "agentic" systems that reason, plan, and execute.



Core Responsibilities

Agentic Orchestration: Design and deploy multi-agent workflows using OpenClaw and DigitalOcean Gradient AI.



Distributed Architecture: Manage a fleet of DigitalOcean Droplets, ensuring each business unit (
, 
, etc.) remains isolated yet interconnected via a central "CEO" Orchestrator.



The Utah Bridge: Securely integrate cloud agents with a physical Android/Mac Mini device farm in Utah using Tailscale and private networking.



Security & Secrets: Implement a Zero-Trust security model using Doppler to manage API keys and credentials without exposing production secrets.



Full-Stack Agility: Build and maintain frontend dashboards (React/Tailwind) and backend databases (Managed PostgreSQL) to visualize agent performance and manage "Human-in-the-Loop" approvals.



Required Skills

AI/LLM Proficiency: Deep experience with Claude 3.7/4.6, GPT-5, and Llama models. Experience with prompt engineering and agentic "chain-of-thought" logic is non-negotiable.



Cloud DevOps: Expert-level knowledge of DigitalOcean (Droplets, Projects, VPC) and Docker.



Networking: Experience with Tailscale, mesh VPNs, and secure "Local-to-Cloud" tunneling.



Backend Stack: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, and GitHub Actions (CI/CD).



Ownership Mentality: Ability to work autonomously with a "founder’s mindset" during US Mountain Time (MST) overlaps.

title: TikTok Affiliate Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
Role Summary

 We are hiring an Affiliate Assistant to support our TikTok Shop affiliate operations. The key focus of this role is to identify and recruit creators, onboard them to our agency, provide product links, and track creator performance to help creators and brands grow GMV. Our portfolio includes both women’s and men’s brands, and you will work with both female and male creators.



---

Key Responsibilities

Creator Outreach & Onboarding

- Identify potential TikTok creators daily (UK focus) across fashion & lifestyle categories.

- Send outreach messages, introduce the collaboration, and onboard creators to our agency process.

- Maintain a creator contact list/CRM and follow up consistently to convert leads into active creators.



Affiliate Link & Product Support

- Share product links with creators and guide them on which products are high-potential.

- Support basic product selection: understand product features, target audience, and why an item may convert well.

- Coordinate with internal teams/brands to get updated links, commission changes, and priority products.



Creator Management & Content Coordination

- Communicate with creators to encourage posting and maintain posting consistency.

- Track creators’ videos and performance (posted videos, views/engagement, GMV/sales where available).

- Support creators by sharing quick recommendations (best products, best angles, campaign updates).



Performance Tracking

- Track and update creator performance data weekly (and daily when needed).

- Prepare simple reports: active creators, posted videos, best-performing products/creators, gaps and next actions.

- Flag issues early (creators not posting, low performance, wrong product matching) and propose next steps.



Collaboration with Brands

- Work with brand teams to identify creator needs and recruit more creators to promote the brand.

- Support sampling/requests and ensure creators receive the correct information to start posting.



---

Requirements

- Basic to good English communication skills (written and spoken) — comfortable messaging creators and joining simple calls when needed.

- Minimum 2 years of e-commerce experience preferred (TikTok Shop or Amazon is a plus).

- Strong interest in fashion & lifestyle (women’s and men’s products).

- Good communication and interpersonal skills — confident speaking with creators and building relationships.

- Highly organized and detail-oriented (tracking sheets, follow-ups, link management).

- Strong and stable internet connection (required).

- Able to work independently, learn fast, and handle multiple tasks daily.

Nice to Have

- Experience with TikTok Shop affiliate/creator outreach, MCN/agency work, or influencer marketing.

title: Marketing Data Analyst & Ads Specialist
description:
Position: Marketing Data Auditor & Ads Specialist

Company: Yard Dawgs Lawn Care

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-time, Monday–Friday (Mountain Time, flexible start)

Reports To: Liam Sunstrum, Owner



About Us



Yard Dawgs Lawn Care is a fast-growing lawn care company operating across 6 locations in Alberta and Saskatchewan, Canada. We provide weed control, fertilizer, aeration, and specialty lawn treatments to over 10,000 customers. We're scaling toward $5M in revenue this year and need someone obsessed with data accuracy to make sure every marketing dollar is tracked and accounted for.



The Role

We spend heavily on Google Ads, Meta 
/Instagram) Ads, and generate leads through organic and direct channels across 6 locations. We need a detail-oriented person to audit every single lead that comes in each day and ensure the marketing source is accurately tracked from our CRM (HubSpot) into our field service software (Real Green). Our marketing budget decisions depend on the accuracy of this data.



Core Responsibilities



Daily Lead Source Auditing



Audit ALL inbound leads daily (50–100+ leads/day) across phone calls and form submissions

Cross-reference HubSpot lead source data against what was entered in Real Green

Identify and correct any source mismatches (e.g., a Google Ad lead entered as Organic)

Flag unresolvable leads for management review

Maintain a daily audit log tracking every lead reviewed, match status, and corrections made



Lead Tracking & Reporting



Track total leads, qualified leads, and converted customers by source (Google Ads,
 Ads, Organic, Direct, Referral, Yard Sign, etc.)

Track performance by location (Calgary, Edmonton, Red Deer, Medicine Hat, Saskatoon, Regina)

Maintain weekly accuracy reports showing rep error rates and source-level mismatch patterns

Build and maintain a monthly marketing performance dashboard including: Cost Per Lead, Cost Per Sale, Conversion Rate, LTV:CAC Ratio, and ROI by channel and location



Ad Platform & Attribution Monitoring



Monitor that Google Ads and Meta Ads leads are being attributed correctly in HubSpot (Paid Search vs. Paid Social vs. Organic, etc.)

Verify UTM parameters and tracking templates are working properly across all ad accounts

Flag any attribution errors or tracking issues immediately (e.g.,
 leads showing as Paid Search)

Ensure naming conventions are followed across all ad campaigns





Bonus (Higher Pay Available)



If you are an expert in running Google Ads (Search, Performance Max), Meta Ads 
/Instagram), and can manage ad campaigns end-to-end — strategy, setup, optimization, reporting — we are willing to pay significantly more for the right person. This would expand the role into hands-on ad management across 6 locations in addition to auditing.

If you have this experience, include examples of campaigns you've managed, monthly budgets, and results in your application. If you are really good at this and have true HubSpot, Excel, Ads experience we can do between 7-10 USD per hour.

title: Packaging Designer
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand selling on Bol.com, focused on building high-quality, standout consumer products. Our mission is simple: create premium brands that customers trust, love, and reorder. Packaging plays a critical role in that experience — and that’s where you come in.



The Role



We’re looking for a top-performing Packaging Designer who understands that packaging is more than just design — it’s conversion, branding, and customer experience combined. You will be responsible for creating visually compelling, high-quality packaging that elevates our products and strengthens our brand presence online and offline.



This is not a basic design role — we want someone who thinks strategically, moves fast, and delivers at a high level.



Key Responsibilities



-Design premium packaging for new and existing products (boxes, labels, inserts, etc.)

-Translate brand identity into high-converting, visually appealing packaging

-Ensure packaging aligns with Bol.com marketplace standards and customer expectations

-Collaborate with product, marketing, and sourcing teams

-Prepare print-ready files and work with suppliers/manufacturers

-Continuously improve designs based on customer feedback, reviews, and performance data

-Stay ahead of trends in e-commerce packaging and branding



Requirements:



-Proven experience as a Packaging Designer (portfolio required)

-Strong skills in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop (InDesign is a plus)

-Experience with print production and packaging dielines

-Strong understanding of branding, typography, and visual hierarchy

-Ability to design for conversion, not just aesthetics

-Experience in e-commerce (Amazon, Bol.com, Shopify brands) is a big plus

-Detail-oriented, fast, and able to meet deadlines



What We’re Looking For:



-Someone who thinks like a brand owner, not just a designer

-High standards — you care about quality and details

-Proactive and performance-driven mindset

-Ability to take feedback and iterate quickly

-Strong communicator and team player

-Nice to Have

-Experience with product photography direction

-Knowledge of packaging materials and sustainability

-Experience working with Asian manufacturers



What We Offer:



-Work with a fast-growing premium e-commerce brand

-High ownership and creative freedom

-Competitive compensation

-Opportunity to build and shape strong consumer brands

-Long-term growth potential

title: Video Editor & Animator – Dream Body Fitness App
description:
We're building Dream Body, a fast-growing fitness app, and we're looking for a part-time video editor and animator who lives and breathes Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro. You'll be creating eye-catching animated motion graphics that elevate our social content across TikTok and Instagram.



This is a part-time role at around 15–20 hours per week, fully remote, with the potential to grow as we scale.



What you'll do

You'll create animated motion graphics for our short-form social content — think dynamic text animations, branded visual effects, animated overlays, and scroll-stopping transitions. Working from creative briefs provided by our team, you'll bring concepts to life with polished motion design that feels native to social platforms. As we grow, you'll also help us build out a library of reusable motion templates to keep our output consistent and efficient at volume.



What we're looking for

We need someone with strong skills in After Effects and Premiere Pro -  this is the core of the role, so you should be confident working across both. Experience creating motion graphics for social content is essential, and we'd love to see examples in your portfolio. You should be comfortable working to a brief, delivering clean files on time, and iterating quickly based on feedback. 



What we offer

You'll get clear briefs, an organised workflow, and a reliable volume of work each week. This is a genuine long-term opportunity with a team that's easy to work with. 



To apply

Send us your portfolio or showreel with examples of motion graphics and animation work, particularly anything created for social platforms.

title: Freelance Social Media Strategist & VA
description:
We produce long-form content on YouTube — strategy breakdowns, founder war stories, and technology frameworks built for operators making high-stakes decisions. Your job is to take that content and build a consistent, high-impact presence across LinkedIn, TikTok, and Meta.

This is a strategic role, not an execution-only role. We already have a video editor. What we need is someone who understands what lands on each platform, can prompt AI video clipping tools to pull the right moments, write captions that match the platform culture, and make smart recommendations about what to push and when.

The goal is simple: turn one YouTube video per week into a content engine that wins consulting clients.





What You'll Do

Own the monthly content calendar across LinkedIn, TikTok, and Meta — including planning, scheduling, and execution

Use AI video clipping tools (Opus Clip, Descript, or similar) to identify and extract the strongest moments from YouTube videos using script-based prompts

Recommend which clips to prioritise for each platform — understanding that what works on LinkedIn (credibility, depth) is different from TikTok (hooks, speed) and Meta (reach, relatability)

Write platform-native captions in the CDT Digital voice: direct, outcome-focused, zero fluff

Monitor engagement and respond to comments in a way that represents the brand well

Track performance metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth, link clicks) and surface insights — not just numbers

Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) to assist with caption drafts and content ideas — and apply sharp editorial judgement to the output

Flag content opportunities: trending conversations, founder events, industry moments worth jumping on





Who You Are

The right person for this role understands that LinkedIn, TikTok, and Meta are three different environments requiring three different approaches — and can articulate why without being asked. Specifically:

You have managed social media for a B2B brand, consultant, or executive — not just lifestyle or ecom

You can look at a 45-minute YouTube video and tell us which three moments will perform best on LinkedIn versus TikTok, and explain your reasoning

You are fluent with AI tools — you use them to move faster, but your judgement is what makes the output good

You are proactive: you bring ideas, flag risks, and make recommendations rather than waiting to be told what to do next

Your written English is clean, punchy, and free of marketing clichés

You are reliable with deadlines and communicate clearly when anything shifts





Nice to Have

Familiarity with SaaS, startups, or the technology consulting space

Hands-on experience with Opus Clip, Descript, Munch, or similar AI video clipping tools

Experience with scheduling and analytics tools: Buffer, Later, Metricool, or similar

Ability to create basic AI-generated social ads using tools like AdCreative.ai or Canva AI — this is a nice-to-have now but will become a core part of the role as we scale

Understanding of what drives reach on LinkedIn for thought leadership content specifically





Where This Role Goes

We are building a content machine to support two businesses: CDT Digital (consulting) and a second venture focused on AI-powered application development. As that machine grows, so does this role. The person who takes this seriously — brings strategy, not just execution — has a clear path into a Head of Content or Marketing Lead position as the team scales.





How to Apply

Send a short message — not a template — that tells us three things: what B2B brand or executive you have managed social media for; one example of a content decision you made that was platform-specific and why it worked; and which AI tools you currently use in your workflow.

Applications that do not address all three will not be reviewed. We are looking for someone who reads briefs carefully and executes precisely — so the application is your first demonstration of that.

title: Marketing Virtual Assistant for Airbnb Business UK
description:

Who you will be:

title: Content & YouTube Creator for AI Small Business Transformations
description:
We help small businesses adopt AI in ways that actually improve how they operate.

I’m looking for someone to help me build content around that mission, especially YouTube and supporting written content.



This role is for someone who is strong at research, writing, content organization, and turning ideas into useful content.



You’ll help me:

 • research new AI tools and workflows

 • turn ideas into video outlines and content drafts

 • repurpose long-form content into posts and clips

 • help build a consistent content pipeline

 • package content in a way that is practical and appealing to small business owners



I’m not looking for generic AI content or robotic writing. I want someone who can help make content feel clear, human, useful, and grounded in real business problems.



You’d be a strong fit if you:

 • write very well in English

 • are naturally organized

 • understand internet content and packaging

 • are curious about AI and small business

 • can think for yourself and improve rough ideas

 • can use AI tools without sounding like AI



When applying, send me:

 • a short intro

 • samples of your work

 • your favorite content tools

 • a short example of how you’d turn an AI tool update into a useful YouTube topic for small businesses

title: FACEBOOK ADS VIDEO EDITOR
description:
Are you someone who thrives on creativity, speed, and performance?



Do you get excited by the idea of editing videos that don’t just look good — but actually convert, scale, and drive sales?

If your answer is “absolutely”, keep reading — this might be the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.



We’re a fast-growing Beauty e-commerce company on a mission to impact as many people as possible in the European market.

We’re currently looking for a talented Ads Video Editor to join our team.



In this role, you’ll be responsible for turning raw footage, scripts, and creative ideas into high-performing video ads for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.



Your work will directly influence our ability to grab attention, improve conversion rates, reduce CPA, and scale winning campaigns. You won’t just be editing videos — you’ll be helping build the growth engine of the business.

We’re looking for someone ambitious, proactive, and hungry to improve. If you want a role where your work actually matters and where performance is valued, this could be the right fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Editing direct-response video ads designed to convert

Transforming raw footage, UGC clips, voiceovers, and scripts into polished ad creatives

Creating multiple variations of winning ads for testing

Improving hooks, pacing, retention, and overall watch time

Adding captions, motion graphics, sound design, and visual effects where needed

Collaborating with the marketing team to turn performance insights into better creatives

Staying up to date with ad trends, competitor creatives, and what’s working on social media



What We’re Looking For:

What You’ll Need to Bring to the Table:

Strong experience editing video ads, not just aesthetic content

Good understanding of direct-response marketing

Experience with
, Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube ads

Ability to identify strong hooks, fast pacing, and retention-focused editing

Solid sense of storytelling, emotion, and sales psychology

Ability to produce multiple creative variations quickly

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage deadlines

Clear communication and reliability

A mindset focused on growth, improvement, and performance



Nice to Have:

Experience in e-commerce or performance marketing

Experience editing UGC-style ads

Knowledge of what makes a creative perform based on metrics like CTR, hook rate, hold rate, and conversion rate

Basic motion design skills

Experience analyzing competitors’ ad creatives



Company Values:

We move fast

We care about performance

We take ownership

We communicate clearly

We stay coachable and always look for ways to improve



What’s In It For You:

Competitive salary + performance-based bonuses

The chance to work on creatives that actually scale

Real ownership and autonomy

Fast learning and growth opportunities

A team that values initiative, creativity, and results

The opportunity to be part of a growing company with big goals



Ready to Apply?

If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we’d love to hear from you.

Apply here:

explain yourself why you want it, your traits, your life situation, age

title: Calling Agent
description:
About Us:

Soothenest Web Agency is a digital company that helps dental clinics attract more patients by building high-converting websites. We focus on delivering solutions that help clinics grow their business, not just creating websites.





Job Role:

We are looking for highly motivated callers and sales closers who can:



Call dental clinics

Introduce our services clearly and confidently

Send demo websites via WhatsApp

Follow up with interested prospects

Close deals and collect advance payments



This role goes beyond making calls. The primary responsibility is to convert leads into paying clients.



Work Process:



Make calls to dental clinics

Create interest within a 30–60 second conversation

Send demo website via WhatsApp

Follow up with the client

Close the deal

Collect 50?vance payment



You will handle the client until the payment is completed.



Salary and Bonuses:



Base Salary: $600 per month

Performance Bonus: $100 for closing 5 deals in a day



Higher performance leads to higher earnings.



Working Schedule:



Monday to Saturday

09:00 AM to 6:00 PM

Sunday off



Call Expense Support:

Call expenses will be reimbursed at the end of the month.



Payment Cycle:

Monthly payments



Company Location:

Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh



Daily Targets:



250 calls per day

5 to 7 deals per day



Candidate Requirements:



Confident English communication skills

Comfortable speaking with clients

Ability to handle objections

Strong follow-up skills

Consistent and goal-oriented mindset



Not Suitable For:



Those who are not serious about sales

Those unwilling to follow up consistently

Those looking to try temporarily without commitment



Important Note:

Success in this role depends on consistent follow-up, persistence, and the ability to ask for payment. Candidates who are serious about performance-based earnings will find this a strong opportunity.



How to Apply

Please send to whatsapp:

Number: 
A short introduction about yourself

Your experience (if any)

A voice recording explaining about yourself and your family background (to assess communication skills)

title: Marketing & Communications Associate
description:
Long Island Select Healthcare is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) based in Suffolk County, New York, serving over 8,500 patients annually across multiple locations. We provide comprehensive primary care, behavioral health, dental, and specialty services to individuals and families across Long Island, including a significant population of individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities (IDD).



We are seeking a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and self-motivated Marketing & Communications Associate to support our Director of Marketing & Development. This is a full-time remote position requiring availability during Eastern Time business hours. The ideal candidate brings exceptional English writing skills, strong creative instincts, and proven proficiency across graphic design, video production, digital marketing, and content strategy.



This role is fast-paced, high-output, and mission-driven. You will work directly with the Director and, when authorized, with internal staff and external partners including vendors, sponsors, legislators, and media contacts. Healthcare experience is a plus, but drive, precision, and creativity are non-negotiable.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:

Content & Copywriting



Draft, edit, and proofread marketing copy for social media,
 campaigns, web pages, press releases, donor communications, sponsorship materials, and event collateral

Write long-form content including newsletter articles, blog posts, grant narrative support, and community health education pieces

Adapt tone and voice for multiple audiences: patients, donors, corporate sponsors, government stakeholders, and the general public

Maintain brand voice consistency across all written materials



Graphic Design



Design print and digital materials including flyers, brochures, signage, event materials, social media graphics,
 headers, sponsor decks, and presentation slides

Proficient in Canva (required); Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) strongly preferred

Execute design briefs from concept through final production-ready file

Resize and adapt designs across formats and platforms



Video Production & Editing



Produce, edit, and export short-form video content for social media (Instagram Reels,
, YouTube Shorts)

Edit raw footage, add captions, music, text overlays, and branding elements

Support creation of patient testimonial videos, event recap content, and promotional campaigns

Comfortable working with tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent



Digital Marketing



Assist with scheduling and publishing content across
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and other platforms

Support Google Ads and Meta Ads campaign monitoring, reporting, and asset creation

Pull performance reports from Google Analytics 4, Meta Ads Manager, and other platforms

Help manage and update website content as directed



Event & Campaign Support



Provide comprehensive support for the organization's annual fundraising events, including the 1st Annual Benefit Golf Classic (August 2026) and other signature events

Assist with sponsor outreach tracking, sponsor packet assembly, landing page updates, and logistics coordination

Build and maintain event timelines, checklists, and project management entries in Monday.com and/or Asana

Support logistics coordination for community outreach events, ribbon cuttings, and public-facing activities



Development & Fundraising Support



Assist with donor communications, acknowledgment letters, and stewardship materials

Support capital campaign and annual giving efforts with design and copy assets

Help maintain donor and sponsor tracking records in HubSpot CRM

Research grant opportunities and assist with narrative drafting when directed



Administrative & Project Management



Manage and update project boards in Monday.com and Asana

Maintain organized digital asset libraries (logos, photos, templates, documents)

Track deadlines and flag deliverables proactively

Prepare meeting agendas, notes, and follow-up summaries when needed

Communicate professionally with internal staff and approved external contacts on behalf of the Director



Marketing Strategy



Contribute to the development and execution of marketing plans for service line promotions, patient acquisition campaigns, and community outreach initiatives

Assist in identifying target audiences, messaging strategies, and channel selection for campaigns across digital and print

Support tracking and reporting on campaign performance metrics including reach, engagement, patient inquiry volume, and cost per acquisition

Research competitor positioning, community health trends, and demographic data to inform strategic recommendations

Help develop content calendars, campaign timelines, and go-to-market plans for new programs, locations, and events



TO APPLY:

Please submit all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



Resume or CV -- current, detailed, and in English

Cover letter -- written in English, explaining your interest in this role and summarizing your most relevant experience. This is how we assess written communication quality. Templated or generic letters will be disqualified.

Portfolio -- links to samples of your graphic design and video editing work. Work must be your own.

DISC Personality Assessment -- complete the free assessment at the link below and include your results (screenshot or summary) with your application. This is required and non-negotiable.



DISC Assessment Link: https://www.truity.com/test/disc-personality-test

We are looking for a collaborative, detail-oriented, and driven individual who communicates clearly and thrives in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment. Your DISC profile helps us understand how you work, communicate, and handle pressure -- there is no right or wrong result.



Availability confirmation: Please state in your application that you are available Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Eastern Time. Applications that do not confirm availability will not be reviewed.



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:



Excellent written and spoken English -- this is a strict requirement; your application must demonstrate it

Minimum 2 years of experience in marketing, communications, or a related field

Strong graphic design portfolio demonstrating professional-quality work

Demonstrated video editing experience with sample work available

Proficiency in Canva (required) and Adobe Creative Suite (strongly preferred)

Experience with social media management and content scheduling tools

Familiarity with Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, or similar platforms

Comfortable working in project management tools (Monday.com, Asana, or equivalent)

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

Reliable internet connection and a professional home office setup

Availability strictly during Eastern Time hours (8:00 AM to 4:00 PM ET, Monday through Friday)



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (Nice to Have):



Experience working with U.S.-based nonprofit organizations, healthcare providers, or community health centers

Familiarity with Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs), New York State health systems, or healthcare marketing compliance

Experience with HubSpot CRM

Knowledge of HIPAA basics as it relates to marketing and patient communications

Experience supporting fundraising events, donor relations, or grant writing

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder — Copy, Rebrand & Translate Competitor Advertorials (Daily Work)
description:
BUDGET: $15 USD per funnel | 7 days a week (Past experience with proof is needed)



---



ABOUT THE ROLE

--------------

I run a dropshipping business selling health and skincare products in Portugal. I need a funnel builder who can take

competitor advertorials and product pages, rebrand them to my brand and

colors, translate them into the target language, and publish them — fast.



This is a 7-days-a-week ongoing role. If you are reliable and fast,

you will have consistent daily work with me long-term.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO EACH TIME

---------------------
. I send you a competitor advertorial/product page URL

2. You study the layout, structure and copy style

3. You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to:

   - Translate it into the target language (Portuguese)

   - Rebrand all product names, brand names and claims to my brand

   - Rebrand all product images to match our branding

4. You rebuild the page in Funnelish

  5. You apply my brand colors, fonts and logo throughout

6. You deliver a live preview link within 48 hours



Each funnel = 1 advertorial page + 1 product/order page.



---



WHAT I PROVIDE

---------------

- Competitor reference URLs for each funnel

- My brand name, logo, colors and product images

- Product details and any specific claims to include or avoid

- Fast feedback — I will review and approve within 24 hours



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR

---------------------

? MUST HAVE Past Experience building advertorial-style pages (the "article that sells" format)

? Comfortable using AI tools to rewrite and translate copy

? MUST HAVE Experience with Funnelish

? Can match the look and feel of a reference page closely

? Reliable — available 7 days a week, responds within a few hours

? Fast — 48-hour turnaround per funnel is the expectation

? Good eye for design — pages must look professional and trustworthy



---



TO APPLY — ANSWER THESE 5 QUESTIONS

--------------------------------------

Applications without answers to all 5 questions will be ignored.



1. How long have you been using Funnelish?

2. Have you built advertorial/pre-lander pages before?

   Share 2 live examples or screenshots.

3. Have you used AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for copywriting or

   translation?

4. Can you work 7 days a week and deliver within 48 hours per funnel?

5. Leave your number in this format +?6?3?1?2?3?4?5?6?7?8

---



RATE: $15 USD per complete funnel (advertorial + product page)

TYPE: Full-time ongoing, 7 days a week

HOURS: Flexible — async communication is fine, but fast responses expected

START: Immediately

title: Clinical Documentation QA RN
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Registered Nurse (RN) to provide remote clinical documentation quality assurance (QA) support for a home health agency. This role focuses on reviewing daily skilled nursing visit notes to ensure documentation is accurate, individualized, and compliant with agency and regulatory standards.



Key Responsibilities:

-Review daily clinical visit notes for accuracy, completeness, and compliance

-Ensure documentation reflects individualized patient care and is not repetitive or copy-pasted

-Identify inconsistencies, missing information, or documentation errors

-Edit and correct notes within scope to improve clarity, accuracy, and compliance

-Ensure documentation supports skilled need and medical necessity

-Maintain consistency between narrative notes, interventions, and patient condition

-Flag concerns or trends (e.g., repetitive charting patterns) to leadership

-Provide feedback to clinicians to improve documentation quality

-Meet productivity and turnaround expectations for assigned charts

-Communicate effectively with QA team and clinical leadership



Qualifications:

-Minimum 2–3 years of clinical nursing experience

-Home health experience strongly preferred

-Strong understanding of clinical documentation standards

-High attention to detail and ability to identify patterns in documentation

-Ability to work independently in a remote environment

-Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines

title: Social Media Editor
description:

We’re hiring a high-performance video editor to help scale content across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
 — with a primary focus on short-form content, plus weekly long-form podcast editing and thumbnails.

Add:

Captions (burned-in subtitles)

Strong hooks & text overlays

Jump cuts, zooms, pacing edits

Sound effects & music

Repurpose content across platforms (IG, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
)



Edit 1 weekly YouTube podcast episode (long-form)

Create high-converting YouTube thumbnails for each upload



What We’re Looking For:

Strong experience editing short-form content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok) — this is the priority

Ability to create fast-paced, attention-grabbing edits

Experience editing YouTube videos/podcasts

Ability to design clickable YouTube thumbnails

Understanding of hooks, retention, and viral structure

Fluent in English (important for captions + communication)

Fast communication and reliable turnaround times



Bonus Points If You:

Have experience in real estate, business, or finance content

Understand viral trends and platform algorithms

Can suggest hooks, titles, and content ideas

Have worked with creators or personal brands before



Deliverables:

~20 short-form videos per week

1 edited YouTube podcast episode weekly

Custom thumbnails for YouTube uploads

Platform-ready formats (9:16 + YouTube standard)

Clean, engaging, high-retention edits



Compensation:

Open to:

Per video rate

Weekly rate

Monthly retainer

(Based on experience and quality)



How to Apply:



Send:



Your portfolio (short-form REQUIRED)

Your turnaround time

Your pricing (per video or monthly)



Important:



We’re building a high-volume content machine — we need someone who can edit fast, communicate clearly, and consistently deliver viral-level content.



If that’s you, apply now.

title: Experienced Executive Assistant with background in engineering or mathematics
description:
I’m looking for a highly reliable, detail-oriented Executive Assistant with a strong math/engineering background to help with various analytical, research, and admin tasks on an as-needed basis. 



Must consistently deliver within 24 hours of assignment. You will be paid $120 or more per week for doing about 20 hours or more of work. I don't care when you work as long as you can turnaround tasks within 24 hours and you can be available for meetings from 10am to 1pm EST as needed. If you finish the work in less than 20 hours, you will still get paid for at least 20 hours as long as the quality is satifactory. Delegating the work to another person is strictly prohibited.



Requirements

Degree in Math, Engineering, or a related quantitative field

Must have prior experience as an Executive Assistant or high-level VA with Athena, Prialto, Wishup, MyOutDesk or Wing Assistant.

Demonstrated ability to handle analytical, math-heavy, or spreadsheet-based tasks

Has independently completed many ChatGPT/AI-assisted projects and is confident using AI tools

Excellent written English and strong organizational skills

High accuracy, fast learner, and able to work autonomously

Preferably has experience in health care or medical-related operations

Must be responsive and dependable with 24-hour turnaround on tasks



Responsibilities



Analytical tasks, calculations, spreadsheet work

Research and summarization (business, operations, health-care related if needed)

Document creation, process organization, and high-level executive support

Miscellaneous tasks that arise day to day





How to Apply

Send a short intro, relevant experience, examples of analytical work you’ve done, your hourly rate, and your weekly availability. Start your intro with the words "Help is on the way!" :)
